# Project: Disparities in Sedation Practice by Patient Preferred Language

# Setup Step - Setup libraries
```{r setup}
# Install Packages

packages <- c("tidyverse", "zoo", "data.table", "dplyr", "lubridate", "tidyr", "fst", "arrow", "table1", "lme4", "metafor", "yaml", "pscl", "MASS", "htmltools", "car", "WeightIt", "MatchIt", "purrr", "survival", "mediation", "cmprsk", "gfoRmula", "nnet", "medflex", "bruceR", "survey", "ipw", "geepack", "readr", "collapse", "stringr", "rprojroot", "tableone", "lmtest", "mice")
install_if_missing <- function(package) {
  if (!require(package, character.only = TRUE)) {
    install.packages(package, dependencies = TRUE)
    library(package, character.only = TRUE)
  }
}

sapply(packages, install_if_missing)

# Load necessary libraries
library(data.table)
library(dplyr)
library(zoo)  # for na.locf function
library(lubridate)
library(tidyr)
library(fst)
library(arrow)
library(table1)
library(metafor)
library(yaml)
library(htmltools)
library(MASS)
library(pscl)
library(car)
library(stringr)
library(rprojroot)
library(jsonlite)
library(tableone)
library(lmtest)
library(mice)


# Define paths
project_root <- file.path(
  find_root(rprojroot::has_dir("deep_sedation_language_final")),
  "deep_sedation_language_final"
)

config_dir <- file.path(project_root, "config")
knitr::opts_knit$set(root.dir = config_dir)

# Look for both .yaml and .yml
config_file <- c(
  file.path(config_dir, "deep_sedation_language_config.yaml"),
  file.path(config_dir, "deep_sedation_language_config.yml")
)

# Keep only existing files
config_file <- config_file[file.exists(config_file)]

# Error if neither exists
if (length(config_file) == 0) {
  stop("No config file found (.yaml or .yml)")
}

# If both exist, take the first (yaml prioritized here)
config <- yaml::read_yaml(config_file[1])

# Define directories based on YAML configuration
data_dir <- config$data_dir
local_dir <- config$local_dir
output_dir <- file.path(local_dir, "output/")
intermediate_dir <- file.path(local_dir, "intermediate_data_DO_NOT_UPLOAD/")  # Define output_dir based on data_dir
final_data_dir <- file.path(output_dir, "FINAL_DATA_UPLOAD_ME/")
cohort_characteristics <- file.path(final_data_dir, "cohort_characteristics/")
sedation_project <- file.path(final_data_dir, "sedation_project/")
sedation_tables_dir <- file.path(sedation_project, "final_tables/")
sedation_final_data <- file.path(sedation_project, "final_data/")
sedation_sensitivity <- file.path(sedation_final_data, "sensitivity_analyses/")
sedation_secondary <- file.path(sedation_final_data, "secondary_analyses/")
sedation_exploratory <- file.path(sedation_final_data, "exploratory_analyses/")
sedation_subgroup <- file.path(sedation_final_data, "subgroup_analyses/")
paralytics_project <- file.path(final_data_dir, "paralytics_project/")
paralytics_tables_dir <- file.path(paralytics_project, "final_tables/")  
paralytics_final_data <- file.path(paralytics_project, "final_data/")
paralytics_exploratory <- file.path(paralytics_final_data, "exploratory_analyses/")
paralytics_exploratory_tables <- file.path(paralytics_tables_dir, "exploratory_tables/")
arf_project <- file.path(final_data_dir, "arf_project/")
arf_tables_dir <- file.path(arf_project, "final_tables/")  
arf_final_data <- file.path(arf_project, "final_data/")
measurements_project <- file.path(final_data_dir, "measurements_project/")
measurements_tables_dir <- file.path(measurements_project, "final_tables/")  
measurements_final_data <- file.path(measurements_project, "final_data/")
measurements_model_data <- file.path(measurements_final_data, "model_data/")

file_type <- config$file_type
institution <- config$institution
time_zone <- config$time_zone

# Create all directories
dirs_to_create <- c(
  output_dir,
  intermediate_dir,
  final_data_dir,
  cohort_characteristics,
  sedation_project,
  sedation_tables_dir,
  sedation_final_data,
  sedation_sensitivity,
  sedation_secondary,
  sedation_exploratory,
  sedation_subgroup,
  paralytics_project,
  paralytics_tables_dir,
  paralytics_final_data,
  paralytics_exploratory,
  paralytics_exploratory_tables,
  arf_project,
  arf_tables_dir,
  arf_final_data,
  measurements_project,
  measurements_tables_dir,
  measurements_final_data,
  measurements_model_data
)

for (dir in dirs_to_create) {
  dir.create(dir, recursive = TRUE, showWarnings = FALSE)
}
```

#Upload Data

```{r}
# Upload Analytic File
total_cohort <- read_parquet(paste0(intermediate_dir, "analytic_file", institution, ".parquet"))
setDT(total_cohort)
total_cohort[
  race_category == "asian",
  race_category := "other/unknown"
]
total_cohort[, observation_year := as.double(observation_year)]
# Upload hospital system language information
language_data <- fread(paste0(cohort_characteristics, institution, "_hospital_system_language_counts", ".csv"))
setDT(language_data)

cat_vars <- c("sex_category", "ethnicity_category", "race_category", "hospital_id", "icu_imv", "location_of_intubation", "admission_type_category", "arf_flag", "aHrf_flag")

cont_vars <- c("age_at_admission", "bmi", "elixhauser_score", "SVM_SCORE", "laps2", "time_to_first_rass", "rass_frequency_hrs", "observation_year", "time_from_begin_imv_to_icu_hours")

```

#Function to Create Table 1s
```{r}
#Table 1: Descriptive
make_table1_federated <- function(dt,
                                  cat_vars = NULL,
                                  cont_vars = NULL,
                                  by = NULL,
                                  site_name = NA_character_) {
  dt <- as.data.table(copy(dt))
  out_list <- list()
  
  #-----------------------------#
  # CATEGORICAL VARIABLES
  #-----------------------------#
  if (!is.null(cat_vars) && length(cat_vars) > 0) {
    for (v in cat_vars) {
      
      if (!is.null(by)) {
        tmp <- dt[, .(n = .N), by = c(by, v)]
        
        totals <- dt[, .(N = .N), by = by]
        
        tmp <- merge(tmp, totals, by = by, all.x = TRUE)
        
        setnames(tmp, old = by, new = "group")
        setnames(tmp, old = v, new = "level")
        
        tmp[, `:=`(
          site = site_name,
          variable = v,
          variable_type = "categorical",
          level = as.character(level),
          pct = 100 * n / N,
          mean = NA_real_,
          sd = NA_real_,
          median = NA_real_,
          p25 = NA_real_,
          p75 = NA_real_,
          min = NA_real_,
          max = NA_real_
        )]
        
      } else {
        tmp <- dt[, .(n = .N), by = v]
        total_n <- nrow(dt)
        
        setnames(tmp, old = v, new = "level")
        
        tmp[, `:=`(
          site = site_name,
          group = "overall",
          variable = v,
          variable_type = "categorical",
          level = as.character(level),
          N = total_n,
          pct = 100 * n / N,
          mean = NA_real_,
          sd = NA_real_,
          median = NA_real_,
          p25 = NA_real_,
          p75 = NA_real_,
          min = NA_real_,
          max = NA_real_
        )]
      }
      
      tmp <- tmp[, .(
        site, group, variable, variable_type, level,
        n, N, pct,
        mean, sd, median, p25, p75, min, max
      )]
      
      out_list[[paste0("cat_", v)]] <- tmp
    }
  }
  
  #-----------------------------#
  # CONTINUOUS VARIABLES
  #-----------------------------#
  if (!is.null(cont_vars) && length(cont_vars) > 0) {
    for (v in cont_vars) {
      
      if (!is.null(by)) {
        tmp <- dt[, .(
          n = sum(!is.na(get(v))),
          N = .N,
          pct = NA_real_,
          mean = if (all(is.na(get(v)))) NA_real_ else mean(get(v), na.rm = TRUE),
          sd = if (sum(!is.na(get(v))) <= 1) NA_real_ else sd(get(v), na.rm = TRUE),
          median = if (all(is.na(get(v)))) NA_real_ else median(get(v), na.rm = TRUE),
          p25 = if (all(is.na(get(v)))) NA_real_ else as.numeric(quantile(get(v), 0.25, na.rm = TRUE)),
          p75 = if (all(is.na(get(v)))) NA_real_ else as.numeric(quantile(get(v), 0.75, na.rm = TRUE)),
          min = if (all(is.na(get(v)))) NA_real_ else min(get(v), na.rm = TRUE),
          max = if (all(is.na(get(v)))) NA_real_ else max(get(v), na.rm = TRUE)
        ), by = by]
        
        setnames(tmp, old = by, new = "group")
        
        tmp[, `:=`(
          site = site_name,
          variable = v,
          variable_type = "continuous",
          level = NA_character_
        )]
        
      } else {
        tmp <- dt[, .(
          n = sum(!is.na(get(v))),
          N = .N,
          pct = NA_real_,
          mean = if (all(is.na(get(v)))) NA_real_ else mean(get(v), na.rm = TRUE),
          sd = if (sum(!is.na(get(v))) <= 1) NA_real_ else sd(get(v), na.rm = TRUE),
          median = if (all(is.na(get(v)))) NA_real_ else median(get(v), na.rm = TRUE),
          p25 = if (all(is.na(get(v)))) NA_real_ else as.numeric(quantile(get(v), 0.25, na.rm = TRUE)),
          p75 = if (all(is.na(get(v)))) NA_real_ else as.numeric(quantile(get(v), 0.75, na.rm = TRUE)),
          min = if (all(is.na(get(v)))) NA_real_ else min(get(v), na.rm = TRUE),
          max = if (all(is.na(get(v)))) NA_real_ else max(get(v), na.rm = TRUE)
        )]
        
        tmp[, `:=`(
          site = site_name,
          group = "overall",
          variable = v,
          variable_type = "continuous",
          level = NA_character_
        )]
      }
      
      tmp <- tmp[, .(
        site, group, variable, variable_type, level,
        n, N, pct,
        mean, sd, median, p25, p75, min, max
      )]
      
      out_list[[paste0("cont_", v)]] <- tmp
    }
  }
  
  out <- rbindlist(out_list, fill = TRUE, use.names = TRUE)
  
  setcolorder(out, c(
    "site", "group", "variable", "variable_type", "level",
    "n", "N", "pct", "mean", "sd", "median", "p25", "p75", "min", "max"
  ))
  
  return(out[])
}

# Table 1: Comparative
make_table1_comparisons <- function(dt, by, cont_vars = NULL, cat_vars = NULL,
                                    site_name = NA_character_, group_levels = NULL,
                                    reference_level = NULL, fisher_if_expected_lt5 = TRUE) {
  dt <- as.data.table(copy(dt))
  
  if (!(by %in% names(dt))) stop(sprintf("Grouping variable '%s' not found in dt.", by))
  dt <- dt[!is.na(get(by))]
  dt[, (by) := as.character(get(by))]
  
  observed_groups <- unique(dt[[by]])
  observed_groups <- observed_groups[!is.na(observed_groups)]
  
  if (!is.null(reference_level)) {
    if (!reference_level %in% observed_groups)
      stop(sprintf("reference_level '%s' not found in data.", reference_level))
    ref <- reference_level
    comparators <- if (!is.null(group_levels)) group_levels[group_levels != ref] else sort(observed_groups[observed_groups != ref])
  } else {
    if (!is.null(group_levels)) {
      if (length(group_levels) != 2) stop("group_levels must have length 2.")
      ref <- group_levels[1]; comparators <- group_levels[2]
    } else {
      if (length(observed_groups) != 2)
        stop(sprintf("Found %s groups — supply reference_level for 3+ groups.", paste(observed_groups, collapse = ", ")))
      grps <- sort(observed_groups); ref <- grps[1]; comparators <- grps[2]
    }
  }

  #--------------------------------------------------#
  # Helper: multilevel categorical SMD
  #--------------------------------------------------#
  calc_multilevel_smd <- function(x, group, g1, g2) {
    dsub <- data.table(x = as.character(x), group = as.character(group))
    dsub <- dsub[!is.na(group) & group %in% c(g1, g2)]
    dsub[is.na(x), x := "missing"]
    levs <- sort(unique(dsub$x))
    if (length(levs) < 2) return(NA_real_)
    ref_lev <- levs[1]
    keep_levs <- levs[levs != ref_lev]
    make_indicator_matrix <- function(vals, levels_keep) {
      out <- sapply(levels_keep, function(lv) as.numeric(vals == lv))
      if (is.null(dim(out))) { out <- matrix(out, ncol = 1); colnames(out) <- levels_keep }
      out
    }
    x1 <- dsub[group == g1, x]; x2 <- dsub[group == g2, x]
    if (length(x1) < 2 || length(x2) < 2) return(NA_real_)
    M1 <- make_indicator_matrix(x1, keep_levs)
    M2 <- make_indicator_matrix(x2, keep_levs)
    p1 <- colMeans(M1); p2 <- colMeans(M2); d <- p2 - p1
    S1 <- stats::cov(M1); S2 <- stats::cov(M2)
    if (is.null(dim(S1))) S1 <- matrix(S1, nrow = 1, ncol = 1)
    if (is.null(dim(S2))) S2 <- matrix(S2, nrow = 1, ncol = 1)
    S_pooled <- (S1 + S2) / 2
    S_inv <- try(solve(S_pooled), silent = TRUE)
    if (inherits(S_inv, "try-error")) {
      if (!requireNamespace("MASS", quietly = TRUE)) return(NA_real_)
      S_inv <- try(MASS::ginv(S_pooled), silent = TRUE)
      if (inherits(S_inv, "try-error")) return(NA_real_)
    }
    as.numeric(sqrt(t(d) %*% S_inv %*% d))
  }

  #--------------------------------------------------#
  # Helper: continuous variable comparison
  #--------------------------------------------------#
  compare_continuous <- function(x, group, var_name, g1, g2, comparison_label) {
    dsub <- data.table(x = x, group = group)
    dsub <- dsub[!is.na(group)]
    
    x1 <- dsub[group == g1, x]
    x2 <- dsub[group == g2, x]
    x1_nonmiss <- x1[!is.na(x1)]
    x2_nonmiss <- x2[!is.na(x2)]
    
    n1 <- length(x1_nonmiss); n2 <- length(x2_nonmiss)
    mean1 <- if (n1 > 0) mean(x1_nonmiss) else NA_real_
    mean2 <- if (n2 > 0) mean(x2_nonmiss) else NA_real_
    sd1   <- if (n1 > 1) sd(x1_nonmiss) else NA_real_
    sd2   <- if (n2 > 1) sd(x2_nonmiss) else NA_real_
    med1  <- if (n1 > 0) median(x1_nonmiss) else NA_real_
    med2  <- if (n2 > 0) median(x2_nonmiss) else NA_real_
    p25_1 <- if (n1 > 0) as.numeric(quantile(x1_nonmiss, 0.25, na.rm = TRUE)) else NA_real_
    p25_2 <- if (n2 > 0) as.numeric(quantile(x2_nonmiss, 0.25, na.rm = TRUE)) else NA_real_
    p75_1 <- if (n1 > 0) as.numeric(quantile(x1_nonmiss, 0.75, na.rm = TRUE)) else NA_real_
    p75_2 <- if (n2 > 0) as.numeric(quantile(x2_nonmiss, 0.75, na.rm = TRUE)) else NA_real_
    
    estimate <- NA_real_; ci_lower <- NA_real_
    ci_upper <- NA_real_; p_value  <- NA_real_
    test_used <- NA_character_
    
    if (n1 >= 2 && n2 >= 2) {
      tt <- try(t.test(x2_nonmiss, x1_nonmiss), silent = TRUE)
      if (!inherits(tt, "try-error")) {
        estimate  <- unname(mean2 - mean1)
        ci_lower  <- unname(tt$conf.int[1])
        ci_upper  <- unname(tt$conf.int[2])
        p_value   <- tt$p.value
        test_used <- "welch_t_test"
      }
    }
    
    pooled_sd <- NA_real_; smd <- NA_real_
    if (n1 >= 2 && n2 >= 2 && !is.na(sd1) && !is.na(sd2)) {
      pooled_sd <- sqrt(((n1 - 1) * sd1^2 + (n2 - 1) * sd2^2) / (n1 + n2 - 2))
      if (!is.na(pooled_sd) && pooled_sd > 0) smd <- (mean2 - mean1) / pooled_sd
    }
    
    data.table(
      site = site_name, variable = var_name, variable_type = "continuous",
      comparison = comparison_label, level = NA_character_,
      group1 = g1, group2 = g2, group1_n = n1, group2_n = n2,
      group1_mean = mean1, group2_mean = mean2,
      group1_sd = sd1, group2_sd = sd2,
      group1_median = med1, group2_median = med2,
      group1_p25 = p25_1, group2_p25 = p25_2,
      group1_p75 = p75_1, group2_p75 = p75_2,
      statistic = "mean_difference", estimate = estimate,
      ci_lower = ci_lower, ci_upper = ci_upper, p_value = p_value,
      smd = smd, effect_measure = "mean_difference",
      test = test_used, note = NA_character_
    )
  }

  #--------------------------------------------------#
  # Helper: categorical variable comparison
  #--------------------------------------------------#
  compare_categorical <- function(x, group, var_name, g1, g2, comparison_label) {
    dsub <- data.table(x = x, group = group)
    dsub <- dsub[!is.na(group)]
    dsub[, x := as.character(x)]
    dsub[is.na(x), x := "missing"]
    
    tab <- table(dsub$x, dsub$group)
    needed_cols <- c(g1, g2)
    if (!all(needed_cols %in% colnames(tab))) {
      full_tab <- matrix(0, nrow = nrow(tab), ncol = 2,
                         dimnames = list(rownames(tab), needed_cols))
      common_cols <- intersect(colnames(tab), needed_cols)
      full_tab[, common_cols] <- tab[, common_cols, drop = FALSE]
      tab <- full_tab
    } else {
      tab <- tab[, needed_cols, drop = FALSE]
    }
    
    n_levels <- nrow(tab)
    n1 <- sum(tab[, g1])
    n2 <- sum(tab[, g2])
    
    overall_smd <- calc_multilevel_smd(dsub$x, dsub$group, g1, g2)
    
    p_value <- NA_real_; test_used <- NA_character_
    if (n_levels >= 1) {
      chisq_try <- try(chisq.test(tab, correct = FALSE), silent = TRUE)
      if (!inherits(chisq_try, "try-error")) {
        expected <- chisq_try$expected
        if (fisher_if_expected_lt5 && any(expected < 5)) {
          fisher_try <- try(fisher.test(tab), silent = TRUE)
          if (!inherits(fisher_try, "try-error")) {
            p_value <- fisher_try$p.value; test_used <- "fisher_exact"
          } else {
            p_value <- chisq_try$p.value; test_used <- "chi_square"
          }
        } else {
          p_value <- chisq_try$p.value; test_used <- "chi_square"
        }
      }
    }
    
    out <- data.table(
      site = site_name, variable = var_name, variable_type = "categorical",
      comparison = comparison_label, level = NA_character_,
      group1 = g1, group2 = g2, group1_n = n1, group2_n = n2,
      group1_mean = NA_real_, group2_mean = NA_real_,
      group1_sd = NA_real_, group2_sd = NA_real_,
      group1_median = NA_real_, group2_median = NA_real_,
      group1_p25 = NA_real_, group2_p25 = NA_real_,
      group1_p75 = NA_real_, group2_p75 = NA_real_,
      statistic = "overall_difference", estimate = NA_real_,
      ci_lower = NA_real_, ci_upper = NA_real_, p_value = p_value,
      smd = overall_smd, effect_measure = "categorical_smd",
      test = test_used, note = NA_character_
    )
    
    if (n_levels == 2) {
      levels_x <- rownames(tab)
      ref_level <- levels_x[1]; target_level <- levels_x[2]
      a <- as.numeric(tab[target_level, g2])
      b <- as.numeric(tab[ref_level,   g2])
      c <- as.numeric(tab[target_level, g1])
      d <- as.numeric(tab[ref_level,   g1])
      p1 <- if ((c + d) > 0) c / (c + d) else NA_real_
      p2 <- if ((a + b) > 0) a / (a + b) else NA_real_
      rd <- if (!is.na(p1) && !is.na(p2)) p2 - p1 else NA_real_
      rd_se <- if (!is.na(p1) && !is.na(p2) && (c + d) > 0 && (a + b) > 0)
        sqrt((p1 * (1 - p1) / (c + d)) + (p2 * (1 - p2) / (a + b))) else NA_real_
      rd_lcl <- if (!is.na(rd_se)) rd - 1.96 * rd_se else NA_real_
      rd_ucl <- if (!is.na(rd_se)) rd + 1.96 * rd_se else NA_real_
      pooled_p <- if (!is.na(p1) && !is.na(p2)) (p1 + p2) / 2 else NA_real_
      smd_binary <- if (!is.na(pooled_p) && pooled_p > 0 && pooled_p < 1)
        (p2 - p1) / sqrt(pooled_p * (1 - pooled_p)) else NA_real_
      
      out_rd <- data.table(
        site = site_name, variable = var_name, variable_type = "categorical",
        comparison = comparison_label, level = target_level,
        group1 = g1, group2 = g2, group1_n = n1, group2_n = n2,
        group1_mean = p1, group2_mean = p2,
        group1_sd = NA_real_, group2_sd = NA_real_,
        group1_median = NA_real_, group2_median = NA_real_,
        group1_p25 = NA_real_, group2_p25 = NA_real_,
        group1_p75 = NA_real_, group2_p75 = NA_real_,
        statistic = "risk_difference", estimate = rd,
        ci_lower = rd_lcl, ci_upper = rd_ucl, p_value = p_value,
        smd = smd_binary, effect_measure = "risk_difference",
        test = test_used,
        note = sprintf("Binary categorical variable. level='%s' treated as event.", target_level)
      )
      out <- rbind(out, out_rd, fill = TRUE)
      
    } else if (n_levels > 2) {
      out[, note := "Multi-level categorical variable: overall p-value and omnibus SMD reported; CI not populated."]
    }
    
    out
  }

  #--------------------------------------------------#
  # Loop over pairwise comparisons
  #--------------------------------------------------#
  all_comparisons <- lapply(comparators, function(comp) {
    g1 <- ref
    g2 <- comp
    comparison_label <- paste0(by, ": ", g2, " vs ", g1)
    dt_pair <- dt[get(by) %in% c(g1, g2)]
    out_list <- list()
    
    if (!is.null(cont_vars)) {
      for (v in cont_vars) {
        if (!(v %in% names(dt_pair))) { warning(sprintf("'%s' not found. Skipping.", v)); next }
        out_list[[paste0("cont_", v)]] <- compare_continuous(dt_pair[[v]], dt_pair[[by]], v, g1, g2, comparison_label)
      }
    }
    
    if (!is.null(cat_vars)) {
      for (v in cat_vars) {
        if (!(v %in% names(dt_pair))) { warning(sprintf("'%s' not found. Skipping.", v)); next }
        out_list[[paste0("cat_", v)]] <- compare_categorical(dt_pair[[v]], dt_pair[[by]], v, g1, g2, comparison_label)
      }
    }
    
    rbindlist(out_list, fill = TRUE, use.names = TRUE)
  })

  out <- rbindlist(all_comparisons, fill = TRUE, use.names = TRUE)
  
  desired_order <- c(
    "site", "variable", "variable_type", "comparison", "level",
    "group1", "group2", "group1_n", "group2_n",
    "group1_mean", "group2_mean", "group1_sd", "group2_sd",
    "group1_median", "group2_median", "group1_p25", "group2_p25",
    "group1_p75", "group2_p75",
    "statistic", "estimate", "ci_lower", "ci_upper",
    "p_value", "smd", "effect_measure", "test", "note"
  )
  existing_order <- desired_order[desired_order %in% names(out)]
  setcolorder(out, existing_order)
  
  return(out[])
}
```

#IPW Calculation for 48-hours of observation
```{r}
ipw_outcome <- total_cohort[, .(
  reached_48h = as.integer(imv_duration_hours_final >= 48)
), by = hospitalization_id]

# Merge the reached_48h flag back to your dataset
ipw_sensitivity_analysis <- merge(total_cohort, ipw_outcome, by = "hospitalization_id")

# Use patient-level covariates to predict censoring
ipw_model <- glm(reached_48h ~ age_at_admission + sex_category + race_category + ethnicity_category + laps2 + factor(hospital_icu_id) + elixhauser_score + factor(observation_year),
                 data = unique(ipw_sensitivity_analysis, by = "hospitalization_id"),
                 family = binomial())

total_cohort[, prob_reach_48h := predict(ipw_model, newdata = total_cohort, type = "response")]
total_cohort[, ipw := 1 / prob_reach_48h]
```

# Build Language Categorizations
```{r}
# 1: English v Non-English
total_cohort[, lang_cat_1 := fifelse(
  language_category == "english", "english",
  fifelse(!is.na(language_category), "non-english", NA_character_)
)]

# 2: English v Spanish v all other non-English
total_cohort[, lang_cat_2 := fcase(
  language_category == "english", "english",
  language_category == "spanish", "spanish",
  !is.na(language_category), "other non-english",
  default = NA_character_
)]

# 3: English v Spanish v third most frequent hospital system wide language - all others NA
# Define third_lang
third_lang <- language_data[
  !trimws(tolower(language_category)) %in% c("english", "spanish", "unknown or na"),
  language_category
][1]

# Define the variable
total_cohort[, lang_cat_3 := fcase(
  language_category == "english", "english",
  language_category == "spanish", "spanish",
  language_category == third_lang, third_lang,
  default = NA_character_
)]

# 4: English v Spanish v Chinese v Vietnamese (three non-English languages with the most evidence supporting the existence of health disparities) - all others NA
total_cohort[, lang_cat_4 := fcase(
  language_category == "english", "english",
  language_category == "spanish", "spanish",
  language_category == "chinese", "chinese",
  language_category == "vietnamese", "vietnamese",
  default = NA_character_
)]

# 5: English v Spanish v Broad Regional Groupings
# South Asian, East Asian, Southeast Asian, Sub-Saharan African, non-colonial European
# Others that do not fit are NA

# -----------------------------
# Define language groupings
# -----------------------------

south_asian_langs <- c(
  "gujarati",
  "hindi",
  "urdu",
  "punjabi",
  "bengali",
  "nepali, marathi, or other indic languages",
  "telugu",
  "tamil",
  "malayalam, kannada, or other dravidian languages"
)

east_asian_langs <- c(
  "chinese",
  "japanese",
  "korean"
)

southeast_asian_langs <- c(
  "vietnamese",
  "khmer",
  "thai, lao, or other tai-kadai languages"
)

other_asian_langs <- c(
  "other languages of asia",
  "tagalog",
  "ilocano, samoan, hawaiian, or other austronesian languages"
)

sub_saharan_african_langs <- c(
  "amharic, somali, or other afro-asiatic languages",
  "yoruba, twi, igbo, or other languages of western africa",
  "swahili or other languages of central, eastern, and southern africa"
)

continental_european_langs <- c(
  "german",
  "greek",
  "russian",
  "polish",
  "italian",
  "serbo-croatian",
  "ukrainian or other slavic languages",
  "yiddish, pennsylvania dutch, or other west germanic languages",
  "other european indo-european languages")
  
mena_langs <- c(
  "arabic",
  "persian",
  "hebrew",
  "armenian"
)

all_other_langs <- c(
  "french",
  "haitian creole",
  "portuguese",
  "other asian indo-european languages",
  "navajo",
  "other native languages of north america",
  "other and unspecified languages"
)

total_cohort[, lang_cat_5 := fcase(
  language_category == "english", "english",
  language_category == "spanish", "spanish",
  language_category %in% south_asian_langs, "south_asian",
  language_category %in% east_asian_langs, "east_asian",
  language_category %in% southeast_asian_langs, "southeast_asian",
  language_category %in% sub_saharan_african_langs, "sub_saharan_african",
  language_category %in% continental_european_langs, "continental_european_langs",
  language_category %in% mena_langs, "mena",
  default = NA_character_
)]

# 6: English v Spanish - all others NA
total_cohort[, lang_cat_6 := fcase(
  language_category == "english", "english",
  language_category == "spanish", "spanish",
  default = NA_character_
)]

# Broad Regional without "other_asian" and "all_other_langs" groups?
total_cohort[, lang_cat_7 := fcase(
  language_category == "english", "english",
  language_category == "spanish", "spanish",
  language_category %in% south_asian_langs, "south_asian",
  language_category %in% east_asian_langs, "east_asian",
  language_category %in% southeast_asian_langs, "southeast_asian",
  language_category %in% other_asian_langs, "other_asian",
  language_category %in% sub_saharan_african_langs, "sub_saharan_african",
  language_category %in% continental_european_langs, "continental_european_langs",
  language_category %in% mena_langs, "mena",
  language_category %in% all_other_langs, "all_other_langs",
  default = NA_character_
)]

```

# SEDATION PROJECT
# Step 1: Total Cohort for Non-English & Spanish + Non-English Analysis
```{r}
# Identify reference points for model
total_cohort$language_category <- relevel(as.factor(total_cohort$language_category), ref = "english")
total_cohort$lang_cat_1 <- relevel(as.factor(total_cohort$lang_cat_1), ref = "english")
total_cohort$lang_cat_2 <- relevel(as.factor(total_cohort$lang_cat_2), ref = "english")
total_cohort$lang_cat_3 <- relevel(as.factor(total_cohort$lang_cat_3), ref = "english")
total_cohort$lang_cat_4 <- relevel(as.factor(total_cohort$lang_cat_4), ref = "english")
total_cohort$lang_cat_5 <- relevel(as.factor(total_cohort$lang_cat_5), ref = "english")
total_cohort$lang_cat_6 <- relevel(as.factor(total_cohort$lang_cat_6), ref = "english")
total_cohort$lang_cat_7 <- relevel(as.factor(total_cohort$lang_cat_7), ref = "english")
total_cohort$sex_category <- relevel(as.factor(total_cohort$sex_category), ref = "male")
total_cohort$race_category <- relevel(as.factor(total_cohort$race_category), ref = "white")
total_cohort$ethnicity_category <- relevel(as.factor(total_cohort$ethnicity_category), ref = "non-hispanic")
total_cohort$ethnicity_category_final <- relevel(as.factor(total_cohort$ethnicity_category_final), ref = "non-hispanic/unknown")
################################################################################
# Eng v Non-Eng
################################################################################
#Descriptive Table One
table1_english_v_nonenglish_cohort_descriptive <- make_table1_federated(
  dt = total_cohort,
  cat_vars = cat_vars,
  cont_vars = cont_vars,
  by = "lang_cat_1",   
  site_name = institution
)

fwrite(
  table1_english_v_nonenglish_cohort_descriptive,
  file.path(sedation_tables_dir, paste0(institution, "_table1_total_cohort_lang_cat_1_descriptive.csv"))
)

#Comparison Table One
table1_english_v_nonenglish_cohort_comparisons <- make_table1_comparisons(
  dt = total_cohort,
  by = "lang_cat_1",
  reference_level = "english",
  cont_vars = cont_vars,
  cat_vars = cat_vars,
  site_name = institution
)

fwrite(
  table1_english_v_nonenglish_cohort_comparisons,
  file.path(sedation_tables_dir, paste0(institution, "_table1_total_cohort_lang_cat_1_comparisons.csv"))
)

# Sedation Sensitivity Analysis - Eng v Non-Eng
sensitivity_model_lang_cat_1 <- lm(percent_deep_sedation_48 ~ lang_cat_1 + race_category + age_category + bmi + sex_category + factor(hospital_icu_id) + elixhauser_score + SVM_SCORE + laps2 + factor(observation_year),
               data = total_cohort)

summary(sensitivity_model_lang_cat_1)

# Extract coefficients, standard errors, variance, and p-values for the adjusted model
sensitivity_model_lang_cat_1_results <- data.frame(
  term = names(coef(sensitivity_model_lang_cat_1)),
  estimate = coef(sensitivity_model_lang_cat_1),
  std.error = summary(sensitivity_model_lang_cat_1)$coefficients[, "Std. Error"],
  variance = (summary(sensitivity_model_lang_cat_1)$coefficients[, "Std. Error"])^2,  # Calculate variance
  p.value = summary(sensitivity_model_lang_cat_1)$coefficients[, "Pr(>|t|)"]  # Extract p-values
)

# Save the results to a file
fwrite(sensitivity_model_lang_cat_1_results, file.path(sedation_sensitivity, paste0(institution, "_sensitivity_analysis_lang_cat_1.csv")))
################################################################################
# Eng v Spanish v Other Non-Eng
################################################################################
```

# Step 5: Defining the primary cohort, primary analysis, secondary analyses, sensitivity analyses, exploratory analyses
```{r}
# First Identify Primary Cohort with All ICUs included
primary_cohort_all_icus <- total_cohort[!is.na(lang_cat_6)]

# Identify reference points for model
primary_cohort_all_icus$language_category <- relevel(as.factor(primary_cohort_all_icus$language_category), ref = "english")
primary_cohort_all_icus$lang_cat_6 <- relevel(as.factor(primary_cohort_all_icus$lang_cat_6), ref = "english")
primary_cohort_all_icus$sex_category <- relevel(as.factor(primary_cohort_all_icus$sex_category), ref = "male")
primary_cohort_all_icus$race_category <- relevel(as.factor(primary_cohort_all_icus$race_category), ref = "white")
primary_cohort_all_icus$ethnicity_category <- relevel(as.factor(primary_cohort_all_icus$ethnicity_category), ref = "non-hispanic")
primary_cohort_all_icus$ethnicity_category_final <- relevel(as.factor(primary_cohort_all_icus$ethnicity_category_final), ref = "non-hispanic/unknown")
################################################################################
# Descriptive Table One
primary_cohort_all_icus_descriptive <- make_table1_federated(
  dt = primary_cohort_all_icus,
  cat_vars = cat_vars,
  cont_vars = cont_vars,
  by = "lang_cat_6",   
  site_name = institution
)

fwrite(
  primary_cohort_all_icus_descriptive,
  file.path(sedation_tables_dir, paste0(institution, "_table1_primary_cohort_all_icus_descriptive.csv"))
)

#Comparison Table One
primary_cohort_all_icus_comparisons <- make_table1_comparisons(
  dt = primary_cohort_all_icus,
  by = "lang_cat_6",
  reference_level = "english",
  cont_vars = cont_vars,
  cat_vars = cat_vars,
  site_name = institution
)

fwrite(
  primary_cohort_all_icus_comparisons,
  file.path(sedation_tables_dir, paste0(institution, "_table1_primary_cohort_all_icus_comparisons.csv"))
)

# Sensitivity Analysis for Patients Admitted to All ICUs
sensitivity_model_primary_all_icus <- lm(percent_deep_sedation_48 ~ lang_cat_6 + race_category + age_category + bmi + sex_category + factor(hospital_icu_id) + elixhauser_score + SVM_SCORE + laps2 + factor(observation_year),
               data = primary_cohort_all_icus)

summary(sensitivity_model_primary_all_icus)

# Extract coefficients, standard errors, variance, and p-values for the adjusted model
sensitivity_model_primary_all_icus_results <- data.frame(
  term = names(coef(sensitivity_model_primary_all_icus)),
  estimate = coef(sensitivity_model_primary_all_icus),
  std.error = summary(sensitivity_model_primary_all_icus)$coefficients[, "Std. Error"],
  variance = (summary(sensitivity_model_primary_all_icus)$coefficients[, "Std. Error"])^2,  # Calculate variance
  p.value = summary(sensitivity_model_primary_all_icus)$coefficients[, "Pr(>|t|)"]  # Extract p-values
)

# Save the results to a file
fwrite(sensitivity_model_primary_all_icus_results, file.path(sedation_sensitivity, paste0(institution, "_sensitivity_analysis_primary_all_icus.csv")))

################################################################################
# Define Primary Cohort: Removing all patients admitted to ICUs w/o Spanish Speakers
################################################################################
# Step 1: Count Spanish-speaking patients by hospital_icu_id
spanish_counts <- primary_cohort_all_icus[
  lang_cat_6 == "spanish", 
  .N, 
  by = hospital_icu_id
]

# Step 2: Identify hospital_icu_id values with 0 Spanish-speaking patients
# (We do this by first getting all unique hospital_icu_id values and checking which ones are missing)
all_hospitals <- unique(primary_cohort_all_icus$hospital_icu_id)
hospitals_with_spanish <- spanish_counts$hospital_icu_id
hospitals_to_remove <- setdiff(all_hospitals, hospitals_with_spanish)

# Step 3: Filter out those hospitals from the original table
primary_cohort <- primary_cohort_all_icus[
  !hospital_icu_id %in% hospitals_to_remove
]

# Identify reference points for model
primary_cohort$language_category <- relevel(as.factor(primary_cohort$language_category), ref = "english")
primary_cohort$lang_cat_1 <- relevel(as.factor(primary_cohort$lang_cat_1), ref = "english")
primary_cohort$lang_cat_2 <- relevel(as.factor(primary_cohort$lang_cat_2), ref = "english")
primary_cohort$lang_cat_3 <- relevel(as.factor(primary_cohort$lang_cat_3), ref = "english")
primary_cohort$lang_cat_4 <- relevel(as.factor(primary_cohort$lang_cat_4), ref = "english")
primary_cohort$lang_cat_5 <- relevel(as.factor(primary_cohort$lang_cat_5), ref = "english")
primary_cohort$lang_cat_6 <- relevel(as.factor(primary_cohort$lang_cat_6), ref = "english")
primary_cohort$sex_category <- relevel(as.factor(primary_cohort$sex_category), ref = "male")
primary_cohort$race_category <- relevel(as.factor(primary_cohort$race_category), ref = "white")
primary_cohort$ethnicity_category <- relevel(as.factor(primary_cohort$ethnicity_category), ref = "non-hispanic")
primary_cohort$ethnicity_category_final <- relevel(as.factor(primary_cohort$ethnicity_category_final), ref = "non-hispanic/unknown")
primary_cohort$continuous_nmba_48 <- relevel(as.factor(primary_cohort$continuous_nmba_48), ref = "0")
################################################################################
# Primary Cohort - Table 1s
################################################################################
# Descriptive Table One
primary_cohort_descriptive <- make_table1_federated(
  dt = primary_cohort,
  cat_vars = cat_vars,
  cont_vars = cont_vars,
  by = "lang_cat_6",   
  site_name = institution
)

fwrite(
  primary_cohort_descriptive,
  file.path(sedation_tables_dir, paste0(institution, "_table1_primary_cohort_descriptive.csv"))
)

#Comparison Table One
primary_cohort_comparisons <- make_table1_comparisons(
  dt = primary_cohort,
  by = "lang_cat_6",
  reference_level = "english",
  cont_vars = cont_vars,
  cat_vars = cat_vars,
  site_name = institution
)

fwrite(
  primary_cohort_comparisons,
  file.path(sedation_tables_dir, paste0(institution, "_table1_primary_cohort_comparisons.csv"))
)
################################################################################
# Primary Cohort - Primary Analysis - Unadjusted and Adjusted
################################################################################
# Fit the unadjusted primary model
primary_model_unadjusted <- lm(percent_deep_sedation_48 ~ lang_cat_6, data = primary_cohort)

summary(primary_model_unadjusted)

# Extract coefficients, standard errors, variance, and p-values for the adjusted model
primary_model_unadjusted_results <- data.frame(
  term = names(coef(primary_model_unadjusted)),
  estimate = coef(primary_model_unadjusted),
  std.error = summary(primary_model_unadjusted)$coefficients[, "Std. Error"],
  variance = (summary(primary_model_unadjusted)$coefficients[, "Std. Error"])^2,  # Calculate variance
  p.value = summary(primary_model_unadjusted)$coefficients[, "Pr(>|t|)"]  # Extract p-values
)


# Save the results to a file
fwrite(primary_model_unadjusted_results, file.path(sedation_final_data, paste0(institution, "_primary_model_unadjusted.csv")))

# Fit the adjusted primary model
primary_model_adjusted <- lm(percent_deep_sedation_48 ~ lang_cat_6 + race_category + age_category + sex_category + bmi + factor(hospital_icu_id) + elixhauser_score + SVM_SCORE + laps2 + factor(observation_year),
               data = primary_cohort)
summary(primary_model_adjusted)

# Extract coefficients, standard errors, variance, and p-values for the adjusted model
primary_model_adjusted_results <- data.frame(
  term = names(coef(primary_model_adjusted)),
  estimate = coef(primary_model_adjusted),
  std.error = summary(primary_model_adjusted)$coefficients[, "Std. Error"],
  variance = (summary(primary_model_adjusted)$coefficients[, "Std. Error"])^2,  # Calculate variance
  p.value = summary(primary_model_adjusted)$coefficients[, "Pr(>|t|)"]  # Extract p-values
)


# Save the results to a file
fwrite(primary_model_adjusted_results, file.path(sedation_final_data, paste0(institution, "_primary_model_adjusted.csv")))

# IMV Time
secondary_model_imv_time <- lm(imv_duration_hours_final ~ lang_cat_6 + race_category + age_category + sex_category + bmi + factor(hospital_icu_id) + elixhauser_score + SVM_SCORE + laps2 + factor(observation_year),
               data = primary_cohort)

summary(secondary_model_imv_time)

# Extract coefficients, standard errors, variance, and p-values for the adjusted model
secondary_model_imv_time_results <- data.frame(
  term = names(coef(secondary_model_imv_time)),
  estimate = coef(secondary_model_imv_time),
  std.error = summary(secondary_model_imv_time)$coefficients[, "Std. Error"],
  variance = (summary(secondary_model_imv_time)$coefficients[, "Std. Error"])^2,  # Calculate variance
  p.value = summary(secondary_model_imv_time)$coefficients[, "Pr(>|t|)"]  # Extract p-values
)

# Save the results to a file
fwrite(secondary_model_imv_time_results, file.path(sedation_secondary, paste0(institution, "_secondary_analysis_imv_time.csv")))

########################
# Tracheostomy Odds
secondary_model_trach <- glm(trached ~ lang_cat_6 + race_category + age_category + sex_category + bmi + factor(hospital_icu_id) + elixhauser_score + SVM_SCORE + laps2 + factor(observation_year), data = primary_cohort, 
                                  family = binomial(link = "logit"))

summary(secondary_model_trach)

# Extract coefficients and calculate odds ratios, standard errors, and variance
coef_summary_trach <- summary(secondary_model_trach)$coefficients
odds_ratios <- exp(coef_summary_trach[, "Estimate"])  # Exponentiated coefficients
standard_errors <- coef_summary_trach[, "Std. Error"]
variance <- standard_errors^2  # Calculate variance
p_values <- coef_summary_trach[, "Pr(>|z|)"]  # Extract p-values

# Create a data frame to hold the results
secondary_model_trach_results <- data.frame(
    Variable = rownames(coef_summary_trach),
    Odds_Ratio = odds_ratios,
    Std_Error = standard_errors,
    Variance = variance,  # Add variance
    P_Value = p_values    # Add p-values
)
secondary_model_trach_results

# Write the results to a CSV file
fwrite(secondary_model_trach_results, file.path(sedation_secondary, paste0(institution, "_secondary_analysis_trach.csv")))

################################################################################
# Primary Cohort - Sensitivity Analyses
################################################################################
# Alternative Definition of Deep Sedation: Binary time weighted RASS score =
# Measured as how long spent in hours at a given RASS score over the time period of observation
# Weighted RASS scores of -3 or lower are treated as deep sedated, otherwise not
sensitivity_model_alt_outcome_definition_1 <- glm(deep_sedation_weighted ~ lang_cat_6 + race_category + age_category + sex_category + bmi + factor(hospital_icu_id) + elixhauser_score + SVM_SCORE + laps2 + factor(observation_year), data = primary_cohort, 
                                  family = binomial(link = "logit"))

summary(sensitivity_model_alt_outcome_definition_1)

# Extract coefficients and calculate odds ratios, standard errors, and variance
coef_summary_alt_def_1 <- summary(sensitivity_model_alt_outcome_definition_1)$coefficients
odds_ratios <- exp(coef_summary_alt_def_1[, "Estimate"])  # Exponentiated coefficients
standard_errors <- coef_summary_alt_def_1[, "Std. Error"]
variance <- standard_errors^2  # Calculate variance
p_values <- coef_summary_alt_def_1[, "Pr(>|z|)"]  # Extract p-values

# Create a data frame to hold the results
sensitivity_model_alt_outcome_definition_1_results <- data.frame(
    Variable = rownames(coef_summary_alt_def_1),
    Odds_Ratio = odds_ratios,
    Std_Error = standard_errors,
    Variance = variance,  # Add variance
    P_Value = p_values    # Add p-values
)
sensitivity_model_alt_outcome_definition_1_results

# Write the results to a CSV file
fwrite(sensitivity_model_alt_outcome_definition_1_results, file.path(sedation_sensitivity, paste0(institution, "_sensitivity_analysis_weighted_deep_sedation.csv")))

#################################

)

# Save the results to a file
fwrite(sensitivity_model_alt_rass_imp_results, file.path(sedation_sensitivity, paste0(institution, "_sensitivity_analysis_rass_imputation.csv")))
##################################
# Alternative Period of Observation: 72 hours instead of 48 hours
sensitivity_model_72h_obs <- lm(percent_deep_sedation_72 ~ lang_cat_6 + race_category + age_category + sex_category + bmi + factor(hospital_icu_id) + elixhauser_score + SVM_SCORE + laps2 + factor(observation_year), data = primary_cohort)

summary(sensitivity_model_72h_obs)

# Extract coefficients, standard errors, variance, and p-values for the adjusted model
sensitivity_model_72h_obs_results <- data.frame(
  term = names(coef(sensitivity_model_72h_obs)),
  estimate = coef(sensitivity_model_72h_obs),
  std.error = summary(sensitivity_model_72h_obs)$coefficients[, "Std. Error"],
  variance = (summary(sensitivity_model_72h_obs)$coefficients[, "Std. Error"])^2,  # Calculate variance
  p.value = summary(sensitivity_model_72h_obs)$coefficients[, "Pr(>|t|)"]  # Extract p-values
)

# Save the results to a file
fwrite(sensitivity_model_72h_obs_results, file.path(sedation_sensitivity, paste0(institution, "_sensitivity_analysis_72hr_obs.csv")))

##################################
# Include Ethnicity as a Confounding Variable
sensitivity_model_ethnicity_inclusion <- lm(percent_deep_sedation_48 ~ lang_cat_6 + race_category + ethnicity_category + age_category + sex_category + bmi + factor(hospital_icu_id) + elixhauser_score + SVM_SCORE + laps2 + factor(observation_year), data = primary_cohort)

summary(sensitivity_model_ethnicity_inclusion)

# Extract coefficients, standard errors, variance, and p-values for the adjusted model
sensitivity_model_ethnicity_inclusion_results <- data.frame(
  term = names(coef(sensitivity_model_ethnicity_inclusion)),
  estimate = coef(sensitivity_model_ethnicity_inclusion),
  std.error = summary(sensitivity_model_ethnicity_inclusion)$coefficients[, "Std. Error"],
  variance = (summary(sensitivity_model_ethnicity_inclusion)$coefficients[, "Std. Error"])^2,  # Calculate variance
  p.value = summary(sensitivity_model_ethnicity_inclusion)$coefficients[, "Pr(>|t|)"]  # Extract p-values
)

# Save the results to a file
fwrite(sensitivity_model_ethnicity_inclusion_results, file.path(sedation_sensitivity, paste0(institution, "_sensitivity_analysis_ethnicity_inclusion.csv")))

######################################
# Include Continuous Paralytics as a Confounding Variable
sensitivity_model_paralytic_inclusion <- lm(percent_deep_sedation_48 ~ lang_cat_6 + race_category + continuous_nmba_48 + age_category + sex_category + bmi + factor(hospital_icu_id) + elixhauser_score + SVM_SCORE + laps2 + factor(observation_year), data = primary_cohort)

summary(sensitivity_model_paralytic_inclusion)

# Extract coefficients, standard errors, variance, and p-values for the adjusted model
sensitivity_model_paralytic_inclusion_results <- data.frame(
  term = names(coef(sensitivity_model_paralytic_inclusion)),
  estimate = coef(sensitivity_model_paralytic_inclusion),
  std.error = summary(sensitivity_model_paralytic_inclusion)$coefficients[, "Std. Error"],
  variance = (summary(sensitivity_model_paralytic_inclusion)$coefficients[, "Std. Error"])^2,  # Calculate variance
  p.value = summary(sensitivity_model_paralytic_inclusion)$coefficients[, "Pr(>|t|)"]  # Extract p-values
)

# Save the results to a file
fwrite(sensitivity_model_paralytic_inclusion_results, file.path(sedation_sensitivity, paste0(institution, "_sensitivity_analysis_paralytic_inclusion.csv")))

################################################################################
# Primary Cohort: Exploratory Analyses, Medications
################################################################################
# Odds of Being Started on continuous benzodiazepines
exploratory_model_benzo_odds <- glm(cont_benzos_receipt ~ lang_cat_6 + race_category + age_category + sex_category + bmi + factor(hospital_icu_id) + elixhauser_score + SVM_SCORE + laps2 + factor(observation_year), data = primary_cohort, 
                                  family = binomial(link = "logit"))

summary(exploratory_model_benzo_odds)

# Extract coefficients and calculate odds ratios, standard errors, and variance
coef_summary_benzo_odds <- summary(exploratory_model_benzo_odds)$coefficients
odds_ratios <- exp(coef_summary_benzo_odds[, "Estimate"])  # Exponentiated coefficients
standard_errors <- coef_summary_benzo_odds[, "Std. Error"]
variance <- standard_errors^2  # Calculate variance
p_values <- coef_summary_benzo_odds[, "Pr(>|z|)"]  # Extract p-values

# Create a data frame to hold the results
exploratory_model_benzo_odds_results <- data.frame(
    Variable = rownames(coef_summary_benzo_odds),
    Odds_Ratio = odds_ratios,
    Std_Error = standard_errors,
    Variance = variance,  # Add variance
    P_Value = p_values    # Add p-values
)
exploratory_model_benzo_odds_results

# Write the results to a CSV file
fwrite(exploratory_model_benzo_odds_results, 
       file.path(sedation_exploratory, paste0(institution, "_exploratory_analysis_benzo_odds.csv")))

#################################
# Difference in total benzo administration in first 48-hours
#   Includes both continuous and intermittent benzos

exploratory_model_total_benzos_received <- lm(lorazepam_equiv_total_48 ~ lang_cat_6 + race_category + age_category + sex_category + bmi + factor(hospital_icu_id) + elixhauser_score + SVM_SCORE + laps2 + factor(observation_year), data = primary_cohort)

summary(exploratory_model_total_benzos_received)

# Extract coefficients, standard errors, variance, and p-values for the adjusted model
secondary_model_total_benzos_results <- data.frame(
  term = names(coef(exploratory_model_total_benzos_received)),
  estimate = coef(exploratory_model_total_benzos_received),
  std.error = summary(exploratory_model_total_benzos_received)$coefficients[, "Std. Error"],
  variance = (summary(exploratory_model_total_benzos_received)$coefficients[, "Std. Error"])^2,  # Calculate variance
  p.value = summary(exploratory_model_total_benzos_received)$coefficients[, "Pr(>|t|)"]  # Extract p-values
)

# Save the results to a file
fwrite(secondary_model_total_benzos_results, 
       file.path(sedation_exploratory, paste0(institution, "_exploratory_analysis_total_benzos_48.csv")))

##############################
# Average Hourly Propofol Dosing
exploratory_model_propofol <- lm(propofol_avg_mcgkgmin_48 ~ lang_cat_6 + race_category + age_category + sex_category + bmi + factor(hospital_icu_id) + elixhauser_score + SVM_SCORE + laps2 + factor(observation_year), data = primary_cohort)

summary(exploratory_model_propofol)

# Extract coefficients, standard errors, variance, and p-values for the adjusted model
exploratory_model_propofol_results <- data.frame(
  term = names(coef(exploratory_model_propofol)),
  estimate = coef(exploratory_model_propofol),
  std.error = summary(exploratory_model_propofol)$coefficients[, "Std. Error"],
  variance = (summary(exploratory_model_propofol)$coefficients[, "Std. Error"])^2,  # Calculate variance
  p.value = summary(exploratory_model_propofol)$coefficients[, "Pr(>|t|)"]  # Extract p-values
)

# Save the results to a CSV file
fwrite(exploratory_model_propofol_results, file.path(sedation_exploratory, paste0(institution, "_exploratory_analysis_propofol.csv")))

#################################
# Average Hourly Precedex Dosing
exploratory_model_precedex <- lm(dexmedetomidine_avg_mcgkghr_48 ~ lang_cat_6 + race_category + age_category + sex_category + bmi + factor(hospital_icu_id) + elixhauser_score + SVM_SCORE + laps2 + factor(observation_year), data = primary_cohort)

summary(exploratory_model_precedex)

# Extract coefficients, standard errors, variance, and p-values for the adjusted model
exploratory_model_precedex_results <- data.frame(
  term = names(coef(exploratory_model_precedex)),
  estimate = coef(exploratory_model_precedex),
  std.error = summary(exploratory_model_precedex)$coefficients[, "Std. Error"],
  variance = (summary(exploratory_model_precedex)$coefficients[, "Std. Error"])^2,  # Calculate variance
  p.value = summary(exploratory_model_precedex)$coefficients[, "Pr(>|t|)"]  # Extract p-values
)

# Save the results to a CSV file
fwrite(exploratory_model_precedex_results, file.path(sedation_exploratory, paste0(institution, "_exploratory_analysis_precedex.csv")))

################################
# Odds of receiving opioids alone without any sedatives
#   Sedatives included: propofol, precedex, pentobarbital, midazolam, lorazepam, ketamine

exploratory_model_opioid_only_analgesia <- glm(cont_analgesia_only ~ lang_cat_6 + race_category + age_category + sex_category + bmi + factor(hospital_icu_id) + elixhauser_score + SVM_SCORE + laps2 + factor(observation_year), data = primary_cohort, 
                                  family = binomial(link = "logit"))

summary(exploratory_model_opioid_only_analgesia)

# Extract coefficients and calculate odds ratios, standard errors, and variance
coef_summary_opioid_only_cont <- summary(exploratory_model_opioid_only_analgesia)$coefficients
odds_ratios <- exp(coef_summary_opioid_only_cont[, "Estimate"])  # Exponentiated coefficients
standard_errors <- coef_summary_opioid_only_cont[, "Std. Error"]
variance <- standard_errors^2  # Calculate variance
p_values <- coef_summary_opioid_only_cont[, "Pr(>|z|)"]  # Extract p-values

# Create a data frame to hold the results
exploratory_model_opioid_only_results <- data.frame(
    Variable = rownames(coef_summary_opioid_only_cont),
    Odds_Ratio = odds_ratios,
    Std_Error = standard_errors,
    Variance = variance,  # Add variance
    P_Value = p_values    # Add p-values
)
exploratory_model_opioid_only_results

# Write the results to a CSV file
fwrite(exploratory_model_opioid_only_results, file.path(sedation_exploratory, paste0(institution, "_exploratory_analysis_opioid_only.csv")))

#################################
# Total morphine milligram equivalents - continuous and intermittent over first 48 hours
#   Like all of these medication analyses: total hours observed is used as 48 for 
#   people who are intubated at least that length otherwise observed until end_imv

exploratory_model_mme <- lm(total_mme ~ lang_cat_6 + race_category + age_category + sex_category + bmi + factor(hospital_icu_id) + elixhauser_score + SVM_SCORE + laps2 + factor(observation_year), data = primary_cohort)

summary(exploratory_model_mme)

# Extract coefficients, standard errors, variance, and p-values for the adjusted model
exploratory_model_mme_results <- data.frame(
  term = names(coef(exploratory_model_mme)),
  estimate = coef(exploratory_model_mme),
  std.error = summary(exploratory_model_mme)$coefficients[, "Std. Error"],
  variance = (summary(exploratory_model_mme)$coefficients[, "Std. Error"])^2,  # Calculate variance
  p.value = summary(exploratory_model_mme)$coefficients[, "Pr(>|t|)"]  # Extract p-values
)

# Save the results to a file
fwrite(exploratory_model_mme_results, file.path(sedation_exploratory, paste0(institution, "_exploratory_analysis_mme_total.csv")))

```

# Step 6: Sensitivity and Sub-Group Analyses That Require Filtering Primary Cohort
```{r}
################################################################################
# Hispanic Sub-Group Analysis
################################################################################
hispanic_cohort <- primary_cohort[ethnicity_category == "hispanic"]

hispanic_cohort$lang_cat_6 <- relevel(as.factor(hispanic_cohort$lang_cat_6), ref = "english")
hispanic_cohort$sex_category <- relevel(as.factor(hispanic_cohort$sex_category), ref = "male")
hispanic_cohort$race_category <- relevel(as.factor(hispanic_cohort$race_category), ref = "white")

########################
# Descriptive Table One
hispanic_cohort_descriptive <- make_table1_federated(
  dt = hispanic_cohort,
  cat_vars = cat_vars,
  cont_vars = cont_vars,
  by = "lang_cat_6",   
  site_name = institution
)

fwrite(
  hispanic_cohort_descriptive,
  file.path(sedation_tables_dir, paste0(institution, "_table1_hispanic_cohort_descriptive.csv"))
)

#Comparison Table One
hispanic_cohort_comparisons <- make_table1_comparisons(
  dt = hispanic_cohort,
  by = "lang_cat_6",
  reference_level = "english",
  cont_vars = cont_vars,
  cat_vars = cat_vars,
  site_name = institution
)

fwrite(
  hispanic_cohort_comparisons,
  file.path(sedation_tables_dir, paste0(institution, "_table1_hispanic_cohort_comparisons.csv"))
)

# Sensitivity Analysis for Hispanic Patients
subgroup_model_hispanic <- lm(percent_deep_sedation_48 ~ lang_cat_6 + race_category + age_category + bmi + sex_category + factor(hospital_icu_id) + elixhauser_score + SVM_SCORE + laps2 + factor(observation_year),
               data = hispanic_cohort)

summary(subgroup_model_hispanic)

# Extract coefficients, standard errors, variance, and p-values for the adjusted model
subgroup_model_hispanic_results <- data.frame(
  term = names(coef(subgroup_model_hispanic)),
  estimate = coef(subgroup_model_hispanic),
  std.error = summary(subgroup_model_hispanic)$coefficients[, "Std. Error"],
  variance = (summary(subgroup_model_hispanic)$coefficients[, "Std. Error"])^2,  # Calculate variance
  p.value = summary(subgroup_model_hispanic)$coefficients[, "Pr(>|t|)"]  # Extract p-values
)

# Save the results to a file
fwrite(subgroup_model_hispanic_results, file.path(sedation_subgroup, paste0(institution, "_subgroup_analysis_hispanic.csv")))

################################################################################
# Non-Hispanic Sub-Group Analysis
################################################################################
non_hispanic_cohort <- primary_cohort[ethnicity_category == "non-hispanic"]

non_hispanic_cohort$lang_cat_6 <- relevel(as.factor(non_hispanic_cohort$lang_cat_6), ref = "english")
non_hispanic_cohort$sex_category <- relevel(as.factor(non_hispanic_cohort$sex_category), ref = "male")
non_hispanic_cohort$race_category <- relevel(as.factor(non_hispanic_cohort$race_category), ref = "white")

########################
# Descriptive Table One
non_hispanic_cohort_descriptive <- make_table1_federated(
  dt = non_hispanic_cohort,
  cat_vars = cat_vars,
  cont_vars = cont_vars,
  by = "lang_cat_6",   
  site_name = institution
)

fwrite(
  non_hispanic_cohort_descriptive,
  file.path(sedation_tables_dir, paste0(institution, "_table1_non_hispanic_cohort_descriptive.csv"))
)

#Comparison Table One
non_hispanic_cohort_comparisons <- make_table1_comparisons(
  dt = non_hispanic_cohort,
  by = "lang_cat_6",
  reference_level = "english",
  cont_vars = cont_vars,
  cat_vars = cat_vars,
  site_name = institution
)

fwrite(
  non_hispanic_cohort_comparisons,
  file.path(sedation_tables_dir, paste0(institution, "_table1_non_hispanic_cohort_comparisons.csv"))
)

# Sensitivity Analysis for Non-Hispanic Patients
tryCatch({
  subgroup_model_non_hispanic <- lm(percent_deep_sedation_48 ~ lang_cat_6 + race_category + age_category + bmi + sex_category + factor(hospital_icu_id) + elixhauser_score + SVM_SCORE + laps2 + factor(observation_year),
               data = non_hispanic_cohort)

summary(subgroup_model_non_hispanic)

# Extract coefficients, standard errors, variance, and p-values for the adjusted model
subgroup_model_non_hispanic_results <- data.frame(
  term = names(coef(subgroup_model_non_hispanic)),
  estimate = coef(subgroup_model_non_hispanic),
  std.error = summary(subgroup_model_non_hispanic)$coefficients[, "Std. Error"],
  variance = (summary(subgroup_model_non_hispanic)$coefficients[, "Std. Error"])^2,  # Calculate variance
  p.value = summary(subgroup_model_non_hispanic)$coefficients[, "Pr(>|t|)"]  # Extract p-values
)

# Save the results to a file
fwrite(subgroup_model_non_hispanic_results, file.path(sedation_subgroup, paste0(institution, "_subgroup_analysis_non_hispanic.csv")))
}, error = function(e) {
  message("Skipping non_hispanic subgroup model: ", conditionMessage(e))
})

################################################################################

################################################################################

micu_cohort$lang_cat_6 <- relevel(as.factor(micu_cohort$lang_cat_6), ref = "english")
micu_cohort$sex_category <- relevel(as.factor(micu_cohort$sex_category), ref = "male")

  cat_vars = cat_vars,
  cont_vars = cont_vars,
  by = "lang_cat_6",

)

fwrite(

  file.path(sedation_tables_dir, paste0(institution, "_table1_micu_cohort_descriptive.csv"))
)

  dt = micu_cohort,
  by = "lang_cat_6",

  file.path(sedation_tables_dir, paste0(institution, "_table1_micu_cohort_comparisons.csv"))
)

               data = micu_cohort)

)

# Sensitivity Analysis for Patients with acute respiratory failure
subgroup_model_non_arf_cohort <- lm(percent_deep_sedation_48 ~ lang_cat_6 + race_category + age_category + bmi + sex_category + factor(hospital_icu_id) + elixhauser_score + SVM_SCORE + laps2 + factor(observation_year),
               data = non_arf_cohort)
 
summary(subgroup_model_non_arf_cohort)

# Extract coefficients, standard errors, variance, and p-values for the adjusted model
subgroup_model_non_arf_cohort_results <- data.frame(
  term = names(coef(subgroup_model_non_arf_cohort)),
  estimate = coef(subgroup_model_non_arf_cohort),
  std.error = summary(subgroup_model_non_arf_cohort)$coefficients[, "Std. Error"],
  variance = (summary(subgroup_model_non_arf_cohort)$coefficients[, "Std. Error"])^2,  # Calculate variance
  p.value = summary(subgroup_model_non_arf_cohort)$coefficients[, "Pr(>|t|)"]  # Extract p-values
)

# Save the results to a file
fwrite(subgroup_model_non_arf_cohort_results, file.path(sedation_subgroup, paste0(institution, "_subgroup_analysis_non_arf.csv")))

  admission_dttm < as.POSIXct("2020-03-01 00:00:00")]

pre_pandemic_cohort$sex_category <- relevel(as.factor(pre_pandemic_cohort$sex_category), ref = "male")

  by = "lang_cat_6",

)

)

)

# Subgroup Analysis for Patients admitted prior to the COVID-19 pandemic
tryCatch({
subgroup_model_pre_pandemic_cohort <- lm(percent_deep_sedation_48 ~ lang_cat_6 + race_category + age_category + bmi + sex_category + factor(hospital_icu_id) + elixhauser_score + SVM_SCORE + laps2 + factor(observation_year),
               data = pre_pandemic_cohort)

summary(subgroup_model_pre_pandemic_cohort)

  term = names(coef(subgroup_model_pre_pandemic_cohort)),
  estimate = coef(subgroup_model_pre_pandemic_cohort),
  std.error = summary(subgroup_model_pre_pandemic_cohort)$coefficients[, "Std. Error"],
  variance = (summary(subgroup_model_pre_pandemic_cohort)$coefficients[, "Std. Error"])^2,  # Calculate variance
  p.value = summary(subgroup_model_pre_pandemic_cohort)$coefficients[, "Pr(>|t|)"]  # Extract p-values
)

# Save the results to a file
fwrite(subgroup_model_pre_pandemic_cohort_results, file.path(sedation_subgroup, paste0(institution, "_subgroup_analysis_pre_pandemic.csv")))
}, error = function(e) {
  message("Skipping pre_pandemic subgroup model: ", conditionMessage(e))
})

################################################################################
# Reclassify Spanish Speakers as Hispanic Sensitivity Analysis and Include
# Ethnicity in Model Sensitivity Analysis
################################################################################
ethnicity_reclass_cohort <- copy(primary_cohort)
ethnicity_reclass_cohort <- ethnicity_reclass_cohort[ethnicity_category == "unknown" 
                                           & language_category == "spanish",
                                           ethnicity_category := "hispanic"]

ethnicity_reclass_cohort[ethnicity_category == "unknown" & 
                          language_category == "english",
                          ethnicity_category := "non-hispanic"]

ethnicity_reclass_cohort[ethnicity_category == "non-hispanic" & 
                           language_category == "spanish",
                           ethnicity_category := "hispanic"]

ethnicity_reclass_cohort$lang_cat_6 <- relevel(as.factor(ethnicity_reclass_cohort$lang_cat_6), ref = "english")
ethnicity_reclass_cohort$sex_category <- relevel(as.factor(ethnicity_reclass_cohort$sex_category), ref = "male")
ethnicity_reclass_cohort$race_category <- relevel(as.factor(ethnicity_reclass_cohort$race_category), ref = "white")
ethnicity_reclass_cohort$ethnicity_category <- relevel(as.factor(ethnicity_reclass_cohort$ethnicity_category), ref = "non-hispanic")

)

fwrite(
  ethnicity_reclass_cohort_comparisons,
  file.path(sedation_tables_dir, paste0(institution, "_table1_ethnicity_reclass_cohort_comparisons.csv"))
)

# Sensitivity Analysis addressing ethnicity and language overlap
sensitivity_model_ethnicity_reclass_cohort <- lm(percent_deep_sedation_48 ~ lang_cat_6 + race_category + age_category + ethnicity_category + bmi + sex_category + factor(hospital_icu_id) + elixhauser_score + SVM_SCORE + laps2 + factor(observation_year),
               data = ethnicity_reclass_cohort)

summary(sensitivity_model_ethnicity_reclass_cohort)

# Extract coefficients, standard errors, variance, and p-values for the adjusted model
sensitivity_model_ethnicity_reclass_cohort_results <- data.frame(
  term = names(coef(sensitivity_model_ethnicity_reclass_cohort)),
  estimate = coef(sensitivity_model_ethnicity_reclass_cohort),
  std.error = summary(sensitivity_model_ethnicity_reclass_cohort)$coefficients[, "Std. Error"],
  variance = (summary(sensitivity_model_ethnicity_reclass_cohort)$coefficients[, "Std. Error"])^2,  # Calculate variance
  p.value = summary(sensitivity_model_ethnicity_reclass_cohort)$coefficients[, "Pr(>|t|)"]  # Extract p-values
)

# Save the results to a file
fwrite(sensitivity_model_ethnicity_reclass_cohort_results, file.path(sedation_sensitivity, paste0(institution, "_sensitivity_analysis_ethnicity_reclass.csv")))

################################################################################
# Remove Unknown Ethnicity and Include Ethnicity in Model Sensitivity Analysis
################################################################################
no_unknown_ethnicity_cohort <- primary_cohort[ethnicity_category != "unknown"]

no_unknown_ethnicity_cohort$lang_cat_6 <- relevel(as.factor(no_unknown_ethnicity_cohort$lang_cat_6), ref = "english")
no_unknown_ethnicity_cohort$sex_category <- relevel(as.factor(no_unknown_ethnicity_cohort$sex_category), ref = "male")
no_unknown_ethnicity_cohort$race_category <- relevel(as.factor(no_unknown_ethnicity_cohort$race_category), ref = "white")
no_unknown_ethnicity_cohort$ethnicity_category <- relevel(as.factor(no_unknown_ethnicity_cohort$ethnicity_category), ref = "non-hispanic")

########################
# Descriptive Table One
no_unknown_ethnicity_cohort_descriptive <- make_table1_federated(
  dt = no_unknown_ethnicity_cohort,
  cat_vars = cat_vars,
  cont_vars = cont_vars,
  by = "lang_cat_6",   
  site_name = institution
)

fwrite(
  no_unknown_ethnicity_cohort_descriptive,
  file.path(sedation_tables_dir, paste0(institution, "_table1_no_unknown_ethnicity_cohort_descriptive.csv"))
)

#Comparison Table One
no_unknown_ethnicity_cohort_comparisons <- make_table1_comparisons(
  dt = no_unknown_ethnicity_cohort,
  by = "lang_cat_6",
  reference_level = "english",
  cont_vars = cont_vars,
  cat_vars = cat_vars,
  site_name = institution
)

fwrite(
  no_unknown_ethnicity_cohort_comparisons,
  file.path(sedation_tables_dir, paste0(institution, "_table1_no_unknown_ethnicity_cohort_comparisons.csv"))
)

# Sensitivity Analysis addressing ethnicity and language overlap
sensitivity_model_no_unknown_ethnicity_cohort <- lm(percent_deep_sedation_48 ~ lang_cat_6 + race_category + age_category + ethnicity_category + bmi + sex_category + factor(hospital_icu_id) + elixhauser_score + SVM_SCORE + laps2 + factor(observation_year),
               data = no_unknown_ethnicity_cohort)

summary(sensitivity_model_no_unknown_ethnicity_cohort)

# Extract coefficients, standard errors, variance, and p-values for the adjusted model
sensitivity_model_no_unknown_ethnicity_cohort_results <- data.frame(
  term = names(coef(sensitivity_model_no_unknown_ethnicity_cohort)),
  estimate = coef(sensitivity_model_no_unknown_ethnicity_cohort),
  std.error = summary(sensitivity_model_no_unknown_ethnicity_cohort)$coefficients[, "Std. Error"],
  variance = (summary(sensitivity_model_no_unknown_ethnicity_cohort)$coefficients[, "Std. Error"])^2,  # Calculate variance
  p.value = summary(sensitivity_model_no_unknown_ethnicity_cohort)$coefficients[, "Pr(>|t|)"]  # Extract p-values
)

# Save the results to a file
fwrite(sensitivity_model_no_unknown_ethnicity_cohort_results, file.path(sedation_sensitivity, paste0(institution, "_sensitivity_analysis_no_unknown_ethnicity.csv")))

################################################################################
# Full 48 hours of observation Sensitivity Analysis
################################################################################
#Cohort Intubated for Full 48 Hours
full_48hr_cohort <- primary_cohort[  hours_mechanically_ventilated_72 >= 48]

#Trim IPWs
full_48hr_cohort <- full_48hr_cohort[
  is.finite(ipw) & !is.na(ipw)]
ipw_q <- quantile(full_48hr_cohort$ipw, c(0.01, 0.99), na.rm = TRUE)
full_48hr_cohort[, ipw := pmin(pmax(ipw, ipw_q[1]), ipw_q[2])]

# Identify reference points for model
full_48hr_cohort$lang_cat_6 <- relevel(as.factor(full_48hr_cohort$lang_cat_6), ref = "english")
full_48hr_cohort$sex_category <- relevel(as.factor(full_48hr_cohort$sex_category), ref = "male")
full_48hr_cohort$race_category <- relevel(as.factor(full_48hr_cohort$race_category), ref = "white")

# Step 1: Fit Model with IPW weighting
sensitivity_model_full_48 <- lm(
  percent_deep_sedation_48 ~ lang_cat_6 + race_category + age_category + bmi + sex_category + factor(hospital_icu_id) + elixhauser_score + SVM_SCORE + laps2 + factor(observation_year),
  data = full_48hr_cohort,
  weights = ipw
)

# Step 2: Calculate robust standard errors with a fallback
robust_se <- tryCatch(
  vcovHC(sensitivity_model_full_48, type = "HC3"),
  error = function(e) NULL
)

if (is.null(robust_se) || anyNA(robust_se)) {
  warning("HC3 robust SE failed at this site; falling back to HC0.")
  robust_se <- vcovHC(sensitivity_model_full_48, type = "HC0")
}

# Step 3: Coefficient table
sensitivity_model_full_48_sandwich <- coeftest(sensitivity_model_full_48, vcov = robust_se)

# Step 3: Output coefficient table with robust SEs
sensitivity_model_full_48_sandwich <- coeftest(sensitivity_model_full_48, vcov = robust_se)
print(sensitivity_model_full_48_sandwich)

# Step 4: Extract results from coeftest matrix
sensitivity_model_full_48_results <- data.frame(
  term = rownames(sensitivity_model_full_48_sandwich),
  estimate = sensitivity_model_full_48_sandwich[, "Estimate"],
  std.error = sensitivity_model_full_48_sandwich[, "Std. Error"],
  variance = sensitivity_model_full_48_sandwich[, "Std. Error"]^2,
  p.value = sensitivity_model_full_48_sandwich[, "Pr(>|t|)"]
)

# Step 5: Save the results
fwrite(sensitivity_model_full_48_results, file.path(sedation_sensitivity, paste0(institution, "_sensitivity_analysis_full_48hr.csv")))
```

# Step 7: Cohort Cleaning Summary from Analysis
```{r}
# Step 0: initial count
n_start <- nrow(total_cohort)

# Step 1: Removed for speaking languages other than English or Spanish
n_after_step1 <- nrow(primary_cohort_all_icus)
n_removed_step1 <- n_start - n_after_step1

# Step 2: Removed for being admitted to ICUs without Spanish speakers
n_after_step2 <- nrow(primary_cohort)
n_removed_step2 <- n_after_step1 - n_after_step2

# Tabulation of exclusions
filter_tab_sedation_project <- data.table(
  step = c(
    "Total IMV Patients",
    "Removed for language other than English or Spanish",
    "Removed for admission to ICU without Spanish speakers",
    "Final"
  ),
  n_remaining = c(
    n_start,
    n_after_step1,
    n_after_step2,
    n_after_step2
  ),
  n_removed_this_step = c(
    0,
    n_removed_step1,
    n_removed_step2,
    0
  )
)

filter_tab_sedation_project

fwrite(filter_tab_sedation_project, 
       file.path(cohort_characteristics, paste0(institution, "_01_analysis_cleaning_summary.csv")))
```

```{r}
################################################################################

  table1_english_v_nonenglish_cohort_descriptive,
  file.path(paralytics_tables_dir, paste0(institution, "_table1_total_cohort_lang_cat_1_descriptive.csv"))
)

fwrite(
  table1_english_v_nonenglish_cohort_comparisons,
  file.path(paralytics_tables_dir, paste0(institution, "_table1_total_cohort_lang_cat_1_comparisons.csv"))
)

#Model
lang_cat_1_nmbas <- glm(continuous_nmba_48 ~ lang_cat_1 + race_category + ethnicity_category + age_category + bmi + sex_category + factor(hospital_icu_id) + elixhauser_score + laps2 + factor(observation_year), data = total_cohort, 
                                  family = binomial(link = "logit"))

summary(lang_cat_1_nmbas)

# Extract coefficients and calculate odds ratios, standard errors, and variance
coef_summary_paralysis_lang_cat_1 <- summary(lang_cat_1_nmbas)$coefficients
odds_ratios <- exp(coef_summary_paralysis_lang_cat_1[, "Estimate"])  # Exponentiated coefficients
standard_errors <- coef_summary_paralysis_lang_cat_1[, "Std. Error"]
variance <- standard_errors^2  # Calculate variance
p_values <- coef_summary_paralysis_lang_cat_1[, "Pr(>|z|)"]  # Extract p-values

# Create a data frame to hold the results
paralysis_model_lang_cat_1_results <- data.frame(
    Variable = rownames(coef_summary_paralysis_lang_cat_1),
    Odds_Ratio = odds_ratios,
    Std_Error = standard_errors,
    Variance = variance,  # Add variance
    P_Value = p_values    # Add p-values
)
paralysis_model_lang_cat_1_results

# Write the results to a CSV file
fwrite(paralysis_model_lang_cat_1_results, file.path(paralytics_final_data, paste0(institution, "_paralysis_lang_cat_1.csv")))
```

```{r}
#############
#Model
arf_lang_cat_2_nmbas <- glm(continuous_nmba_48 ~ lang_cat_2 + race_category + ethnicity_category + age_category + bmi + sex_category + factor(hospital_icu_id) + elixhauser_score + laps2 + factor(observation_year), data = lang_cat_1_2_arf_cohort, 
                                  family = binomial(link = "logit"))

summary(arf_lang_cat_2_nmbas)

# Extract coefficients and calculate odds ratios, standard errors, and variance
coef_summary_paralysis_lang_cat_2_arf <- summary(arf_lang_cat_2_nmbas)$coefficients
odds_ratios <- exp(coef_summary_paralysis_lang_cat_2_arf[, "Estimate"])  # Exponentiated coefficients
standard_errors <- coef_summary_paralysis_lang_cat_2_arf[, "Std. Error"]
variance <- standard_errors^2  # Calculate variance
p_values <- coef_summary_paralysis_lang_cat_2_arf[, "Pr(>|z|)"]  # Extract p-values

# Create a data frame to hold the results
paralysis_model_lang_cat_2_arf_results <- data.frame(
    Variable = rownames(coef_summary_paralysis_lang_cat_2_arf),
    Odds_Ratio = odds_ratios,
    Std_Error = standard_errors,
    Variance = variance,  # Add variance
    P_Value = p_values    # Add p-values
)
paralysis_model_lang_cat_2_arf_results

# Write the results to a CSV file
fwrite(paralysis_model_lang_cat_2_arf_results, file.path(paralytics_final_data, paste0(institution, "_paralysis_lang_cat_2_arf.csv")))
```

```{r}
    P_Value = p_values    # Add p-values
)
paralysis_model_lang_cat_2_non_arf_results

# Write the results to a CSV file
fwrite(paralysis_model_lang_cat_2_non_arf_results, file.path(paralytics_final_data, paste0(institution, "_paralysis_lang_cat_2_non_arf.csv")))

)
###############
#Model
non_arf_lang_cat_3_nmbas <- glm(continuous_nmba_48 ~ lang_cat_3 + race_category + ethnicity_category + age_category + bmi + sex_category + factor(hospital_icu_id) + elixhauser_score + laps2 + factor(observation_year), data = lang_cat_3_non_arf_cohort, 
                                  family = binomial(link = "logit"))

summary(non_arf_lang_cat_3_nmbas)

# Extract coefficients and calculate odds ratios, standard errors, and variance
coef_summary_paralysis_lang_cat_3_non_arf <- summary(non_arf_lang_cat_3_nmbas)$coefficients
odds_ratios <- exp(coef_summary_paralysis_lang_cat_3_non_arf[, "Estimate"])  # Exponentiated coefficients
standard_errors <- coef_summary_paralysis_lang_cat_3_non_arf[, "Std. Error"]
variance <- standard_errors^2  # Calculate variance
p_values <- coef_summary_paralysis_lang_cat_3_non_arf[, "Pr(>|z|)"]  # Extract p-values

# Create a data frame to hold the results
paralysis_model_lang_cat_3_non_arf_results <- data.frame(
    Variable = rownames(coef_summary_paralysis_lang_cat_3_non_arf),
    Odds_Ratio = odds_ratios,
    Std_Error = standard_errors,
    Variance = variance,  # Add variance
    P_Value = p_values    # Add p-values
)
paralysis_model_lang_cat_3_non_arf_results

# Write the results to a CSV file
fwrite(paralysis_model_lang_cat_3_non_arf_results, file.path(paralytics_final_data, paste0(institution, "_paralysis_lang_cat_3_non_arf.csv")))
```

# Step 4: ARF Pre-Pandemic, Pandemic, and Endemic for lang_cat_1, 5, 6, 7
```{r}
################################################################################
# Lang_cat_1 ARF
################################################################################
# Pre-Pandemic
lang_cat_1_arf_pre_pandemic_cohort <- lang_cat_1_2_arf_cohort[
  admission_dttm < as.POSIXct("2020-03-01 00:00:00")]

lang_cat_1_arf_pre_pandemic_cohort$lang_cat_1 <- relevel(as.factor(lang_cat_1_arf_pre_pandemic_cohort$lang_cat_1), ref = "english")
lang_cat_1_arf_pre_pandemic_cohort$sex_category <- relevel(as.factor(lang_cat_1_arf_pre_pandemic_cohort$sex_category), ref = "male")
lang_cat_1_arf_pre_pandemic_cohort$race_category <- relevel(as.factor(lang_cat_1_arf_pre_pandemic_cohort$race_category), ref = "white")
lang_cat_1_arf_pre_pandemic_cohort$ethnicity_category <- relevel(as.factor(lang_cat_1_arf_pre_pandemic_cohort$ethnicity_category), ref = "non-hispanic")

########################
# Descriptive Table One
lang_cat_1_arf_pre_pandemic_cohort_descriptive <- make_table1_federated(
  dt = lang_cat_1_arf_pre_pandemic_cohort,
  cat_vars = cat_vars,
  cont_vars = cont_vars,
  by = "lang_cat_1",   
  site_name = institution
)

fwrite(
  lang_cat_1_arf_pre_pandemic_cohort_descriptive,
  file.path(paralytics_tables_dir, paste0(institution, "_table1_lang_cat_1_arf_pre_pandemic_cohort_descriptive.csv"))
)

#Comparison Table One
lang_cat_1_arf_pre_pandemic_cohort_comparisons <- make_table1_comparisons(
  dt = lang_cat_1_arf_pre_pandemic_cohort,
  by = "lang_cat_1",
  reference_level = "english",
  cont_vars = cont_vars,
  cat_vars = cat_vars,
  site_name = institution
)

fwrite(
  lang_cat_1_arf_pre_pandemic_cohort_comparisons,
  file.path(paralytics_tables_dir, paste0(institution, "_table1_lang_cat_1_arf_pre_pandemic_cohort_comparisons.csv"))
)

# Model
tryCatch({
lang_cat_1_arf_pre_pandemic_nmbas <- glm(continuous_nmba_48 ~ lang_cat_1 + race_category + ethnicity_category + age_category + bmi + sex_category + factor(hospital_icu_id) + elixhauser_score + laps2 + factor(observation_year), data = lang_cat_1_arf_pre_pandemic_cohort, 
                                  family = binomial(link = "logit"))

summary(lang_cat_1_arf_pre_pandemic_nmbas)

# Extract coefficients and calculate odds ratios, standard errors, and variance
coef_summary_paralysis_lang_cat_1_arf_pre_pandemic <- summary(lang_cat_1_arf_pre_pandemic_nmbas)$coefficients
odds_ratios <- exp(coef_summary_paralysis_lang_cat_1_arf_pre_pandemic[, "Estimate"])  # Exponentiated coefficients
standard_errors <- coef_summary_paralysis_lang_cat_1_arf_pre_pandemic[, "Std. Error"]
variance <- standard_errors^2  # Calculate variance
p_values <- coef_summary_paralysis_lang_cat_1_arf_pre_pandemic[, "Pr(>|z|)"]  # Extract p-values

# Create a data frame to hold the results
paralysis_model_lang_cat_1_arf_pre_pandemic_results <- data.frame(
    Variable = rownames(coef_summary_paralysis_lang_cat_1_arf_pre_pandemic),
    Odds_Ratio = odds_ratios,
    Std_Error = standard_errors,
    Variance = variance,  # Add variance
    P_Value = p_values    # Add p-values 
)
paralysis_model_lang_cat_1_arf_pre_pandemic_results

# Write the results to a CSV file
fwrite(paralysis_model_lang_cat_1_arf_pre_pandemic_results, file.path(paralytics_final_data, paste0(institution, "_paralysis_lang_cat_1_arf_pre_pandemic.csv")))
}, error = function(e) {
  message("Skipping pre_pandemic subgroup model: ", conditionMessage(e))
})

#################################
# Pandemic
lang_cat_1_arf_pandemic_cohort <- lang_cat_1_2_arf_cohort[
  admission_dttm >= as.POSIXct("2020-03-01 00:00:00") &
  admission_dttm <= as.POSIXct("2021-12-31 23:59:59")]

lang_cat_1_arf_pandemic_cohort$lang_cat_1 <- relevel(as.factor(lang_cat_1_arf_pandemic_cohort$lang_cat_1), ref = "english")
lang_cat_1_arf_pandemic_cohort$sex_category <- relevel(as.factor(lang_cat_1_arf_pandemic_cohort$sex_category), ref = "male")
lang_cat_1_arf_pandemic_cohort$race_category <- relevel(as.factor(lang_cat_1_arf_pandemic_cohort$race_category), ref = "white")
lang_cat_1_arf_pandemic_cohort$ethnicity_category <- relevel(as.factor(lang_cat_1_arf_pandemic_cohort$ethnicity_category), ref = "non-hispanic")

########################

)
```
