```{r}
#################################
# Endemic
lang_cat_1_arf_endemic_cohort <- lang_cat_1_2_arf_cohort[
  admission_dttm > as.POSIXct("2021-12-31 23:59:59")]

lang_cat_1_arf_endemic_cohort$lang_cat_1 <- relevel(as.factor(lang_cat_1_arf_endemic_cohort$lang_cat_1), ref = "english")
lang_cat_1_arf_endemic_cohort$sex_category <- relevel(as.factor(lang_cat_1_arf_endemic_cohort$sex_category), ref = "male")
lang_cat_1_arf_endemic_cohort$race_category <- relevel(as.factor(lang_cat_1_arf_endemic_cohort$race_category), ref = "white")
lang_cat_1_arf_endemic_cohort$ethnicity_category <- relevel(as.factor(lang_cat_1_arf_endemic_cohort$ethnicity_category), ref = "non-hispanic")

########################
# Descriptive Table One
lang_cat_1_arf_endemic_cohort_descriptive <- make_table1_federated(
  dt = lang_cat_1_arf_endemic_cohort,
  cat_vars = cat_vars,
  cont_vars = cont_vars,
  by = "lang_cat_1",   
  site_name = institution
)

fwrite(
  lang_cat_1_arf_endemic_cohort_descriptive,
  file.path(paralytics_tables_dir, paste0(institution, "_table1_lang_cat_1_arf_endemic_cohort_descriptive.csv"))
)

#Comparison Table One
lang_cat_1_arf_endemic_cohort_comparisons <- make_table1_comparisons(
  dt = lang_cat_1_arf_endemic_cohort,
  by = "lang_cat_1",
  reference_level = "english",
  cont_vars = cont_vars,
  cat_vars = cat_vars,
  site_name = institution
)

fwrite(
  lang_cat_1_arf_endemic_cohort_comparisons,
  file.path(paralytics_tables_dir, paste0(institution, "_table1_lang_cat_1_arf_endemic_cohort_comparisons.csv"))
)

# Model
lang_cat_1_arf_endemic_nmbas <- glm(continuous_nmba_48 ~ lang_cat_1 + race_category + ethnicity_category + age_category + bmi + sex_category + factor(hospital_icu_id) + elixhauser_score + laps2 + factor(observation_year), data = lang_cat_1_arf_endemic_cohort, 
                                  family = binomial(link = "logit"))

summary(lang_cat_1_arf_endemic_nmbas)

# Extract coefficients and calculate odds ratios, standard errors, and variance
coef_summary_paralysis_lang_cat_1_arf_endemic <- summary(lang_cat_1_arf_endemic_nmbas)$coefficients
odds_ratios <- exp(coef_summary_paralysis_lang_cat_1_arf_endemic[, "Estimate"])  # Exponentiated coefficients
standard_errors <- coef_summary_paralysis_lang_cat_1_arf_endemic[, "Std. Error"]
variance <- standard_errors^2  # Calculate variance
p_values <- coef_summary_paralysis_lang_cat_1_arf_endemic[, "Pr(>|z|)"]  # Extract p-values

# Create a data frame to hold the results
paralysis_model_lang_cat_1_arf_endemic_results <- data.frame(
    Variable = rownames(coef_summary_paralysis_lang_cat_1_arf_endemic),
    Odds_Ratio = odds_ratios,
    Std_Error = standard_errors,
    Variance = variance,  # Add variance
    P_Value = p_values    # Add p-values 
)
paralysis_model_lang_cat_1_arf_endemic_results

# Write the results to a CSV file
fwrite(paralysis_model_lang_cat_1_arf_endemic_results, file.path(paralytics_final_data, paste0(institution, "_paralysis_lang_cat_1_arf_endemic.csv")))

coef_summary_paralysis_lang_cat_6_arf_endemic <- summary(lang_cat_6_arf_endemic_nmbas)$coefficients
odds_ratios <- exp(coef_summary_paralysis_lang_cat_6_arf_endemic[, "Estimate"])  # Exponentiated coefficients
standard_errors <- coef_summary_paralysis_lang_cat_6_arf_endemic[, "Std. Error"]
variance <- standard_errors^2  # Calculate variance
p_values <- coef_summary_paralysis_lang_cat_6_arf_endemic[, "Pr(>|z|)"]  # Extract p-values

# Create a data frame to hold the results
paralysis_model_lang_cat_6_arf_endemic_results <- data.frame(
    Variable = rownames(coef_summary_paralysis_lang_cat_6_arf_endemic),
    Odds_Ratio = odds_ratios,
    Std_Error = standard_errors,
    Variance = variance,  # Add variance
    P_Value = p_values    # Add p-values 
)
paralysis_model_lang_cat_6_arf_endemic_results

# Write the results to a CSV file
fwrite(paralysis_model_lang_cat_6_arf_endemic_results, file.path(paralytics_final_data, paste0(institution, "_paralysis_lang_cat_6_arf_endemic.csv")))


################################################################################
# Lang_cat 7
################################################################################
# Pre-Pandemic
lang_cat_7_arf_pre_pandemic_cohort <- lang_cat_7_arf_cohort[
  admission_dttm < as.POSIXct("2020-03-01 00:00:00")]

lang_cat_7_arf_pre_pandemic_cohort$lang_cat_7 <- relevel(as.factor(lang_cat_7_arf_pre_pandemic_cohort$lang_cat_7), ref = "english")
lang_cat_7_arf_pre_pandemic_cohort$sex_category <- relevel(as.factor(lang_cat_7_arf_pre_pandemic_cohort$sex_category), ref = "male")
lang_cat_7_arf_pre_pandemic_cohort$race_category <- relevel(as.factor(lang_cat_7_arf_pre_pandemic_cohort$race_category), ref = "white")
lang_cat_7_arf_pre_pandemic_cohort$ethnicity_category <- relevel(as.factor(lang_cat_7_arf_pre_pandemic_cohort$ethnicity_category), ref = "non-hispanic")

########################
# Descriptive Table One
lang_cat_7_arf_pre_pandemic_cohort_descriptive <- make_table1_federated(
  dt = lang_cat_7_arf_pre_pandemic_cohort,
  cat_vars = cat_vars,
  cont_vars = cont_vars,
  by = "lang_cat_7",   
  site_name = institution
)

fwrite(
  lang_cat_7_arf_pre_pandemic_cohort_descriptive,
  file.path(paralytics_tables_dir, paste0(institution, "_table1_lang_cat_7_arf_pre_pandemic_cohort_descriptive.csv"))
)

#Comparison Table One
lang_cat_7_arf_pre_pandemic_cohort_comparisons <- make_table1_comparisons(
  dt = lang_cat_7_arf_pre_pandemic_cohort,
  by = "lang_cat_7",
  reference_level = "english",
  cont_vars = cont_vars,
  cat_vars = cat_vars,
  site_name = institution
)

fwrite(
  lang_cat_7_arf_pre_pandemic_cohort_comparisons,
  file.path(paralytics_tables_dir, paste0(institution, "_table1_lang_cat_7_arf_pre_pandemic_cohort_comparisons.csv"))
)

# Model
tryCatch({
lang_cat_7_arf_pre_pandemic_nmbas <- glm(continuous_nmba_48 ~ lang_cat_7 + race_category + ethnicity_category + age_category + bmi + sex_category + factor(hospital_icu_id) + elixhauser_score + laps2 + factor(observation_year), data = lang_cat_7_arf_pre_pandemic_cohort, 
                                  family = binomial(link = "logit"))

summary(lang_cat_7_arf_pre_pandemic_nmbas)

# Extract coefficients and calculate odds ratios, standard errors, and variance
coef_summary_paralysis_lang_cat_7_arf_pre_pandemic <- summary(lang_cat_7_arf_pre_pandemic_nmbas)$coefficients
odds_ratios <- exp(coef_summary_paralysis_lang_cat_7_arf_pre_pandemic[, "Estimate"])  # Exponentiated coefficients
standard_errors <- coef_summary_paralysis_lang_cat_7_arf_pre_pandemic[, "Std. Error"]
variance <- standard_errors^2  # Calculate variance
p_values <- coef_summary_paralysis_lang_cat_7_arf_pre_pandemic[, "Pr(>|z|)"]  # Extract p-values

# Create a data frame to hold the results
paralysis_model_lang_cat_7_arf_pre_pandemic_results <- data.frame(
    Variable = rownames(coef_summary_paralysis_lang_cat_7_arf_pre_pandemic),
    Odds_Ratio = odds_ratios,
    Std_Error = standard_errors,
    Variance = variance,  # Add variance
    P_Value = p_values    # Add p-values 
)
paralysis_model_lang_cat_7_arf_pre_pandemic_results

# Write the results to a CSV file
fwrite(paralysis_model_lang_cat_7_arf_pre_pandemic_results, file.path(paralytics_final_data, paste0(institution, "_paralysis_lang_cat_7_arf_pre_pandemic.csv")))
}, error = function(e) {
  message("Skipping pre_pandemic subgroup model: ", conditionMessage(e))
})

#################################
# Pandemic
lang_cat_7_arf_pandemic_cohort <- lang_cat_7_arf_cohort[
  admission_dttm >= as.POSIXct("2020-03-01 00:00:00") &
  admission_dttm <= as.POSIXct("2021-12-31 23:59:59")]

lang_cat_7_arf_pandemic_cohort$lang_cat_7 <- relevel(as.factor(lang_cat_7_arf_pandemic_cohort$lang_cat_7), ref = "english")
lang_cat_7_arf_pandemic_cohort$sex_category <- relevel(as.factor(lang_cat_7_arf_pandemic_cohort$sex_category), ref = "male")
lang_cat_7_arf_pandemic_cohort$race_category <- relevel(as.factor(lang_cat_7_arf_pandemic_cohort$race_category), ref = "white")
lang_cat_7_arf_pandemic_cohort$ethnicity_category <- relevel(as.factor(lang_cat_7_arf_pandemic_cohort$ethnicity_category), ref = "non-hispanic")

########################
# Descriptive Table One
lang_cat_7_arf_pandemic_cohort_descriptive <- make_table1_federated(
  dt = lang_cat_7_arf_pandemic_cohort,
  cat_vars = cat_vars,
  cont_vars = cont_vars,
  by = "lang_cat_7",   
  site_name = institution
)

fwrite(
  lang_cat_7_arf_pandemic_cohort_descriptive,
  file.path(paralytics_tables_dir, paste0(institution, "_table1_lang_cat_7_arf_pandemic_cohort_descriptive.csv"))
)

#Comparison Table One
lang_cat_7_arf_pandemic_cohort_comparisons <- make_table1_comparisons(
  dt = lang_cat_7_arf_pandemic_cohort,
  by = "lang_cat_7",
  reference_level = "english",
  cont_vars = cont_vars,
  cat_vars = cat_vars,
  site_name = institution
)

fwrite(
  lang_cat_7_arf_pandemic_cohort_comparisons,
  file.path(paralytics_tables_dir, paste0(institution, "_table1_lang_cat_7_arf_pandemic_cohort_comparisons.csv"))
)

# Model
lang_cat_7_arf_pandemic_nmbas <- glm(continuous_nmba_48 ~ lang_cat_7 + race_category + ethnicity_category + age_category + bmi + sex_category + factor(hospital_icu_id) + elixhauser_score + laps2 + factor(observation_year), data = lang_cat_7_arf_pandemic_cohort, 
                                  family = binomial(link = "logit"))

summary(lang_cat_7_arf_pandemic_nmbas)

# Extract coefficients and calculate odds ratios, standard errors, and variance
coef_summary_paralysis_lang_cat_7_arf_pandemic <- summary(lang_cat_7_arf_pandemic_nmbas)$coefficients
odds_ratios <- exp(coef_summary_paralysis_lang_cat_7_arf_pandemic[, "Estimate"])  # Exponentiated coefficients

    Variable = rownames(coef_summary_paralysis_lang_cat_7_arf_pandemic),

paralysis_model_lang_cat_7_arf_pandemic_results

# Write the results to a CSV file

#################################
# Endemic
lang_cat_7_arf_endemic_cohort <- lang_cat_7_arf_cohort[
  admission_dttm > as.POSIXct("2021-12-31 23:59:59")]

lang_cat_7_arf_endemic_cohort$lang_cat_7 <- relevel(as.factor(lang_cat_7_arf_endemic_cohort$lang_cat_7), ref = "english")
lang_cat_7_arf_endemic_cohort$sex_category <- relevel(as.factor(lang_cat_7_arf_endemic_cohort$sex_category), ref = "male")

########################
```

# Step 5: Exploratory Analyses for Racial, Ethnic, Gender Disparities in Paralytic Use
```{r}
################################################################################
# Set up cohorts
################################################################################
# Upload Data
paralytic_exploratory_analysis <- read_parquet(paste0(intermediate_dir, "analytic_file", institution, ".parquet"))
setDT(paralytic_exploratory_analysis)

# Establish English v Non-English
paralytic_exploratory_analysis[, lang_cat_1 := fifelse(
  language_category == "english", "english",
  fifelse(!is.na(language_category), "non-english", NA_character_)
)]

# Identify reference points for models
paralytic_exploratory_analysis$lang_cat_1 <- relevel(as.factor(paralytic_exploratory_analysis$lang_cat_1), ref = "english")
paralytic_exploratory_analysis$sex_category <- relevel(as.factor(paralytic_exploratory_analysis$sex_category), ref = "male")
paralytic_exploratory_analysis$race_category <- relevel(as.factor(paralytic_exploratory_analysis$race_category), ref = "white")
paralytic_exploratory_analysis$ethnicity_category <- relevel(as.factor(paralytic_exploratory_analysis$ethnicity_category), ref = "non-hispanic")
paralytic_exploratory_analysis$ethnicity_category_final <- relevel(as.factor(paralytic_exploratory_analysis$ethnicity_category_final), ref = "non-hispanic/unknown")


# Establish ARF Cohort
arf_paralytic_exploratory_analysis <- paralytic_exploratory_analysis[arf_flag == TRUE]

# Identify reference points for models
arf_paralytic_exploratory_analysis$lang_cat_1 <- relevel(as.factor(arf_paralytic_exploratory_analysis$lang_cat_1), ref = "english")
arf_paralytic_exploratory_analysis$sex_category <- relevel(as.factor(arf_paralytic_exploratory_analysis$sex_category), ref = "male")
arf_paralytic_exploratory_analysis$race_category <- relevel(as.factor(arf_paralytic_exploratory_analysis$race_category), ref = "white")
arf_paralytic_exploratory_analysis$ethnicity_category <- relevel(as.factor(arf_paralytic_exploratory_analysis$ethnicity_category), ref = "non-hispanic")
arf_paralytic_exploratory_analysis$ethnicity_category_final <- relevel(as.factor(arf_paralytic_exploratory_analysis$ethnicity_category_final), ref = "non-hispanic/unknown")


# Establish non-ARF Cohort
non_arf_paralytic_exploratory_analysis <- paralytic_exploratory_analysis[arf_flag == FALSE]

# Identify reference points for models
non_arf_paralytic_exploratory_analysis$lang_cat_1 <- relevel(as.factor(non_arf_paralytic_exploratory_analysis$lang_cat_1), ref = "english")
non_arf_paralytic_exploratory_analysis$sex_category <- relevel(as.factor(non_arf_paralytic_exploratory_analysis$sex_category), ref = "male")
non_arf_paralytic_exploratory_analysis$race_category <- relevel(as.factor(non_arf_paralytic_exploratory_analysis$race_category), ref = "white")
non_arf_paralytic_exploratory_analysis$ethnicity_category <- relevel(as.factor(non_arf_paralytic_exploratory_analysis$ethnicity_category), ref = "non-hispanic")
non_arf_paralytic_exploratory_analysis$ethnicity_category_final <- relevel(as.factor(non_arf_paralytic_exploratory_analysis$ethnicity_category_final), ref = "non-hispanic/unknown")

# Establish New cat_vars, cont_vars

cat_vars_explore <- c("sex_category", "race_category", "lang_cat_1", "hospital_id", "icu_imv", "location_of_intubation", "admission_type_category", "arf_flag", "aHrf_flag")

cont_vars_explore <- c("age_at_admission", "bmi", "elixhauser_score", "SVM_SCORE", "laps2", "time_to_first_rass", "rass_frequency_hrs", "observation_year")

################################################################################
# Ethnic Disparities
################################################################################

# All IMV Patients

# Descriptive Table One
paralytic_ethnicity_all_imv_cohort_descriptive <- make_table1_federated(
  dt = paralytic_exploratory_analysis,
  cat_vars = cat_vars_explore,
  cont_vars = cont_vars_explore,
  by = "ethnicity_category",   
  site_name = institution
)

fwrite(
  paralytic_ethnicity_all_imv_cohort_descriptive,
  file.path(paralytics_exploratory_tables, paste0(institution, "_table1_ethnicity_all_imv_descriptive.csv"))
)

#Comparison Table One
paralytic_ethnicity_all_imv_cohort_comparisons <- make_table1_comparisons(
  dt = paralytic_exploratory_analysis,
  by = "ethnicity_category",
  reference_level = "non-hispanic",
  cont_vars = cont_vars_explore,
  cat_vars = cat_vars_explore,
  site_name = institution
)

fwrite(
  paralytic_ethnicity_all_imv_cohort_comparisons,
  file.path(paralytics_exploratory_tables, paste0(institution, "_table1_ethnicity_all_imv_comparisons.csv"))
)

# Model
ethnicity_all_imv_nmbas <- glm(continuous_nmba_48 ~ ethnicity_category + race_category + lang_cat_1 + age_category + bmi + sex_category + factor(hospital_icu_id) + elixhauser_score + laps2 + factor(observation_year), data = paralytic_exploratory_analysis, 
                                  family = binomial(link = "logit"))

summary(ethnicity_all_imv_nmbas)

# Extract coefficients and calculate odds ratios, standard errors, and variance
coef_summary_ethnicity_all_imv_nmbas <- summary(ethnicity_all_imv_nmbas)$coefficients
odds_ratios <- exp(coef_summary_ethnicity_all_imv_nmbas[, "Estimate"])  # Exponentiated coefficients
standard_errors <- coef_summary_ethnicity_all_imv_nmbas[, "Std. Error"]
variance <- standard_errors^2  # Calculate variance
p_values <- coef_summary_ethnicity_all_imv_nmbas[, "Pr(>|z|)"]  # Extract p-values

# Create a data frame to hold the results
coef_summary_ethnicity_all_imv_nmbas_results <- data.frame(
    Variable = rownames(coef_summary_ethnicity_all_imv_nmbas),
    Odds_Ratio = odds_ratios,
    Std_Error = standard_errors,
    Variance = variance,  # Add variance
    P_Value = p_values    # Add p-values 
)
coef_summary_ethnicity_all_imv_nmbas_results

# Write the results to a CSV file
fwrite(coef_summary_ethnicity_all_imv_nmbas_results, file.path(paralytics_exploratory, paste0(institution, "_paralysis_ethnicity_all_imv.csv")))

################################################################################
# ARF Patients

# Descriptive Table One
paralytic_ethnicity_arf_cohort_descriptive <- make_table1_federated(
  dt = arf_paralytic_exploratory_analysis,
  cat_vars = cat_vars_explore,
  cont_vars = cont_vars_explore,
  by = "ethnicity_category",   
  site_name = institution
)

fwrite(
  paralytic_ethnicity_arf_cohort_descriptive,
  file.path(paralytics_exploratory_tables, paste0(institution, "_table1_ethnicity_arf_descriptive.csv"))
)

#Comparison Table One
paralytic_ethnicity_arf_cohort_comparisons <- make_table1_comparisons(
  dt = arf_paralytic_exploratory_analysis,
  by = "ethnicity_category",
  reference_level = "non-hispanic",
  cont_vars = cont_vars_explore,
  cat_vars = cat_vars_explore,
  site_name = institution
)

fwrite(
  paralytic_ethnicity_arf_cohort_comparisons,
  file.path(paralytics_exploratory_tables, paste0(institution, "_table1_ethnicity_arf_comparisons.csv"))
)

# Model
ethnicity_arf_nmbas <- glm(continuous_nmba_48 ~ ethnicity_category + race_category + lang_cat_1 + age_category + bmi + sex_category + factor(hospital_icu_id) + elixhauser_score + laps2 + factor(observation_year), data = arf_paralytic_exploratory_analysis, 
                                  family = binomial(link = "logit"))

summary(ethnicity_arf_nmbas)

# Extract coefficients and calculate odds ratios, standard errors, and variance
coef_summary_ethnicity_arf_nmbas <- summary(ethnicity_arf_nmbas)$coefficients
odds_ratios <- exp(coef_summary_ethnicity_arf_nmbas[, "Estimate"])  # Exponentiated coefficients
standard_errors <- coef_summary_ethnicity_arf_nmbas[, "Std. Error"]
variance <- standard_errors^2  # Calculate variance
p_values <- coef_summary_ethnicity_arf_nmbas[, "Pr(>|z|)"]  # Extract p-values

# Create a data frame to hold the results
coef_summary_ethnicity_arf_nmbas_results <- data.frame(
    Variable = rownames(coef_summary_ethnicity_arf_nmbas),
    Odds_Ratio = odds_ratios,
    Std_Error = standard_errors,
    Variance = variance,  # Add variance
    P_Value = p_values    # Add p-values 
)
coef_summary_ethnicity_arf_nmbas_results

# Write the results to a CSV file
fwrite(coef_summary_ethnicity_arf_nmbas_results, file.path(paralytics_exploratory, paste0(institution, "_paralysis_ethnicity_arf.csv")))

################################################################################
# Non-ARF Patients

# Descriptive Table One
paralytic_ethnicity_non_arf_cohort_descriptive <- make_table1_federated(
  dt = non_arf_paralytic_exploratory_analysis,
  cat_vars = cat_vars_explore,
  cont_vars = cont_vars_explore,
  by = "ethnicity_category",   
  site_name = institution
)

fwrite(
  paralytic_ethnicity_non_arf_cohort_descriptive,
  file.path(paralytics_exploratory_tables, paste0(institution, "_table1_ethnicity_non_arf_descriptive.csv"))
)

#Comparison Table One

  dt = non_arf_paralytic_exploratory_analysis,
  by = "ethnicity_category",
  reference_level = "non-hispanic",
  cont_vars = cont_vars_explore,
  cat_vars = cat_vars_explore,
  site_name = institution
)

fwrite(
  paralytic_ethnicity_non_arf_cohort_comparisons,
  file.path(paralytics_exploratory_tables, paste0(institution, "_table1_ethnicity_non_arf_comparisons.csv"))

################################################################################
# Racial Disparities
################################################################################

# All IMV Patients

  dt = paralytic_exploratory_analysis,
  cat_vars = cat_vars_explore,

)

paralytic_race_all_imv_cohort_comparisons <- make_table1_comparisons(
  dt = paralytic_exploratory_analysis,
  by = "race_category",
  reference_level = "white",
  cont_vars = cont_vars_explore,
  cat_vars = cat_vars_explore,
  site_name = institution
)

fwrite(
  paralytic_race_all_imv_cohort_comparisons,
  file.path(paralytics_exploratory_tables, paste0(institution, "_table1_race_all_imv_comparisons.csv"))
)

# Model
race_all_imv_nmbas <- glm(continuous_nmba_48 ~ race_category + ethnicity_category + lang_cat_1 + age_category + bmi + sex_category + factor(hospital_icu_id) + elixhauser_score + laps2 + factor(observation_year), data = paralytic_exploratory_analysis, 
                                  family = binomial(link = "logit"))

summary(race_all_imv_nmbas)

# Extract coefficients and calculate odds ratios, standard errors, and variance
coef_summary_race_all_imv_nmbas <- summary(race_all_imv_nmbas)$coefficients
odds_ratios <- exp(coef_summary_race_all_imv_nmbas[, "Estimate"])  # Exponentiated coefficients
standard_errors <- coef_summary_race_all_imv_nmbas[, "Std. Error"]
variance <- standard_errors^2  # Calculate variance
p_values <- coef_summary_race_all_imv_nmbas[, "Pr(>|z|)"]  # Extract p-values

# Create a data frame to hold the results
coef_summary_race_all_imv_nmbas_results <- data.frame(
    Variable = rownames(coef_summary_race_all_imv_nmbas),
    Odds_Ratio = odds_ratios,
    Std_Error = standard_errors,
    Variance = variance,  # Add variance
    P_Value = p_values    # Add p-values 
)
coef_summary_race_all_imv_nmbas_results

# Write the results to a CSV file
fwrite(coef_summary_race_all_imv_nmbas_results, file.path(paralytics_exploratory, paste0(institution, "_paralysis_race_all_imv.csv")))
```

# ARF PROJECT
# Step 1: Explore lang_cat_5 group - all ARF, pandemic groupings, no paralytics
```{r}
################################################################################
# lang_cat_5
################################################################################
# All ARF Patients
################################################################################

# Save Table 1s
fwrite(
  lang_cat_5_arf_cohort_descriptive,
  file.path(arf_tables_dir, paste0(institution, "_table1_lang_cat_5_arf_cohort_descriptive.csv"))
)

fwrite(
  lang_cat_5_arf_cohort_comparisons,
  file.path(arf_tables_dir, paste0(institution, "_table1_lang_cat_5_arf_cohort_comparisons.csv"))
)


# Lang_cat_5 model
lang_cat_5_arf_all_deep_sedation <- lm(percent_deep_sedation_48 ~ lang_cat_5 + race_category + age_category + ethnicity_category + bmi + sex_category + factor(hospital_icu_id) + elixhauser_score + SVM_SCORE + laps2 + factor(observation_year),
               data = lang_cat_5_arf_cohort)

summary(lang_cat_5_arf_all_deep_sedation)

# Extract coefficients, standard errors, variance, and p-values for the adjusted model
lang_cat_5_arf_all_deep_sedation_results <- data.frame(
  term = names(coef(lang_cat_5_arf_all_deep_sedation)),
  estimate = coef(lang_cat_5_arf_all_deep_sedation),
  std.error = summary(lang_cat_5_arf_all_deep_sedation)$coefficients[, "Std. Error"],
  variance = (summary(lang_cat_5_arf_all_deep_sedation)$coefficients[, "Std. Error"])^2,  # Calculate variance
  p.value = summary(lang_cat_5_arf_all_deep_sedation)$coefficients[, "Pr(>|t|)"]  # Extract p-values
)

# Save the results to a file
fwrite(lang_cat_5_arf_all_deep_sedation_results, file.path(arf_final_data, paste0(institution, "_lang_cat_5_arf_all_deep_sedation.csv")))

################################################################################
# No Continuous Paralytics Sensitivity Analysis
################################################################################
lang_cat_5_arf_no_cont_nmba_cohort <- lang_cat_5_arf_cohort[continuous_nmba_48 == 0]

lang_cat_5_arf_no_cont_nmba_cohort$lang_cat_5 <- relevel(as.factor(lang_cat_5_arf_no_cont_nmba_cohort$lang_cat_5), ref = "english")
lang_cat_5_arf_no_cont_nmba_cohort$sex_category <- relevel(as.factor(lang_cat_5_arf_no_cont_nmba_cohort$sex_category), ref = "male")
lang_cat_5_arf_no_cont_nmba_cohort$race_category <- relevel(as.factor(lang_cat_5_arf_no_cont_nmba_cohort$race_category), ref = "white")
lang_cat_5_arf_no_cont_nmba_cohort$ethnicity_category <- relevel(as.factor(lang_cat_5_arf_no_cont_nmba_cohort$ethnicity_category), ref = "non-hispanic")

########################
# Descriptive Table One
lang_cat_5_arf_no_cont_nmba_cohort_descriptive <- make_table1_federated(
  dt = lang_cat_5_arf_no_cont_nmba_cohort,
  cat_vars = cat_vars,
  cont_vars = cont_vars,
  by = "lang_cat_5",   
  site_name = institution
)

fwrite(
  lang_cat_5_arf_no_cont_nmba_cohort_descriptive,
  file.path(arf_tables_dir, paste0(institution, "_table1_lang_cat_5_arf_no_cont_nmba_cohort_descriptive.csv"))
)

#Comparison Table One
lang_cat_5_arf_no_cont_nmba_cohort_comparisons <- make_table1_comparisons(
  dt = lang_cat_5_arf_no_cont_nmba_cohort,
  by = "lang_cat_5",
  reference_level = "english",
  cont_vars = cont_vars,
  cat_vars = cat_vars,
  site_name = institution
)

fwrite(
  lang_cat_5_arf_no_cont_nmba_cohort_comparisons,
  file.path(arf_tables_dir, paste0(institution, "_table1_lang_cat_5_arf_no_cont_nmba_cohort_comparisons.csv"))
)

# Sensitivity Analysis for Patients who did not receive continuous NMBAs in first 48 hours of IMV
sensitivity_model_arf_no_cont_nmba_deep_sedation <- lm(percent_deep_sedation_48 ~ lang_cat_5 + race_category + age_category + ethnicity_category + bmi + sex_category + factor(hospital_icu_id) + elixhauser_score + SVM_SCORE + laps2 + factor(observation_year),
               data = lang_cat_5_arf_no_cont_nmba_cohort)

summary(sensitivity_model_arf_no_cont_nmba_deep_sedation)

# Extract coefficients, standard errors, variance, and p-values for the adjusted model
sensitivity_model_arf_no_cont_nmba_deep_sedation_results <- data.frame(
  term = names(coef(sensitivity_model_arf_no_cont_nmba_deep_sedation)),
  estimate = coef(sensitivity_model_arf_no_cont_nmba_deep_sedation),
  std.error = summary(sensitivity_model_arf_no_cont_nmba_deep_sedation)$coefficients[, "Std. Error"],
  variance = (summary(sensitivity_model_arf_no_cont_nmba_deep_sedation)$coefficients[, "Std. Error"])^2,  # Calculate variance
  p.value = summary(sensitivity_model_arf_no_cont_nmba_deep_sedation)$coefficients[, "Pr(>|t|)"]  # Extract p-values
)

# Save the results to a file
fwrite(sensitivity_model_arf_no_cont_nmba_deep_sedation_results, file.path(arf_final_data, paste0(institution, "_sensitivity_analysis_lang_cat_5_arf_no_cont_nmba.csv")))

lang_cat_5_arf_no_nmba_cohort <- lang_cat_5_arf_no_nmba_cohort[push_paralytics == 0]

  estimate = coef(lang_cat_5_arf_pre_pandemic_deep_sedation),
  std.error = summary(lang_cat_5_arf_pre_pandemic_deep_sedation)$coefficients[, "Std. Error"],
  variance = (summary(lang_cat_5_arf_pre_pandemic_deep_sedation)$coefficients[, "Std. Error"])^2,  # Calculate variance
  p.value = summary(lang_cat_5_arf_pre_pandemic_deep_sedation)$coefficients[, "Pr(>|t|)"]  # Extract p-values
)

})
```

```{r}
################################################################################

# Lang_cat_6 model
lang_cat_6_arf_all_deep_sedation <- lm(percent_deep_sedation_48 ~ lang_cat_6 + race_category + age_category + ethnicity_category + bmi + sex_category + factor(hospital_icu_id) + elixhauser_score + SVM_SCORE + laps2 + factor(observation_year),
               data = lang_cat_6_arf_cohort)

summary(lang_cat_6_arf_all_deep_sedation)

# Extract coefficients, standard errors, variance, and p-values for the adjusted model
lang_cat_6_arf_all_deep_sedation_results <- data.frame(
  term = names(coef(lang_cat_6_arf_all_deep_sedation)),
  estimate = coef(lang_cat_6_arf_all_deep_sedation),
  std.error = summary(lang_cat_6_arf_all_deep_sedation)$coefficients[, "Std. Error"],
  variance = (summary(lang_cat_6_arf_all_deep_sedation)$coefficients[, "Std. Error"])^2,
  p.value = summary(lang_cat_6_arf_all_deep_sedation)$coefficients[, "Pr(>|t|)"]
)

# Save the results to a file
fwrite(lang_cat_6_arf_all_deep_sedation_results, file.path(arf_final_data, paste0(institution, "_lang_cat_6_arf_all_deep_sedation.csv")))

################################################################################
# No Continuous Paralytics Sensitivity Analysis
################################################################################
lang_cat_6_arf_no_cont_nmba_cohort <- lang_cat_6_arf_cohort[continuous_nmba_48 == 0]

lang_cat_6_arf_no_cont_nmba_cohort$lang_cat_6 <- relevel(as.factor(lang_cat_6_arf_no_cont_nmba_cohort$lang_cat_6), ref = "english")
lang_cat_6_arf_no_cont_nmba_cohort$sex_category <- relevel(as.factor(lang_cat_6_arf_no_cont_nmba_cohort$sex_category), ref = "male")
lang_cat_6_arf_no_cont_nmba_cohort$race_category <- relevel(as.factor(lang_cat_6_arf_no_cont_nmba_cohort$race_category), ref = "white")
lang_cat_6_arf_no_cont_nmba_cohort$ethnicity_category <- relevel(as.factor(lang_cat_6_arf_no_cont_nmba_cohort$ethnicity_category), ref = "non-hispanic")

########################
# Descriptive Table One
lang_cat_6_arf_no_cont_nmba_cohort_descriptive <- make_table1_federated(
  dt = lang_cat_6_arf_no_cont_nmba_cohort,
  cat_vars = cat_vars,
  cont_vars = cont_vars,
  by = "lang_cat_6",   
  site_name = institution
)

fwrite(
  lang_cat_6_arf_no_cont_nmba_cohort_descriptive,
  file.path(arf_tables_dir, paste0(institution, "_table1_lang_cat_6_arf_no_cont_nmba_cohort_descriptive.csv"))
)

#Comparison Table One
lang_cat_6_arf_no_cont_nmba_cohort_comparisons <- make_table1_comparisons(
  dt = lang_cat_6_arf_no_cont_nmba_cohort,
  by = "lang_cat_6",
  reference_level = "english",
  cont_vars = cont_vars,
  cat_vars = cat_vars,
  site_name = institution
)

fwrite(
  lang_cat_6_arf_no_cont_nmba_cohort_comparisons,
  file.path(arf_tables_dir, paste0(institution, "_table1_lang_cat_6_arf_no_cont_nmba_cohort_comparisons.csv"))
)

# Sensitivity Analysis for Patients who did not receive continuous NMBAs in first 48 hours of IMV
sensitivity_model_arf_no_cont_nmba_deep_sedation_6 <- lm(percent_deep_sedation_48 ~ lang_cat_6 + race_category + age_category + ethnicity_category + bmi + sex_category + factor(hospital_icu_id) + elixhauser_score + SVM_SCORE + laps2 + factor(observation_year),
               data = lang_cat_6_arf_no_cont_nmba_cohort)

summary(sensitivity_model_arf_no_cont_nmba_deep_sedation_6)

# Extract coefficients, standard errors, variance, and p-values for the adjusted model
sensitivity_model_arf_no_cont_nmba_deep_sedation_6_results <- data.frame(
  term = names(coef(sensitivity_model_arf_no_cont_nmba_deep_sedation_6)),
  estimate = coef(sensitivity_model_arf_no_cont_nmba_deep_sedation_6),
  std.error = summary(sensitivity_model_arf_no_cont_nmba_deep_sedation_6)$coefficients[, "Std. Error"],
  variance = (summary(sensitivity_model_arf_no_cont_nmba_deep_sedation_6)$coefficients[, "Std. Error"])^2,
  p.value = summary(sensitivity_model_arf_no_cont_nmba_deep_sedation_6)$coefficients[, "Pr(>|t|)"]
)

# Save the results to a file
fwrite(sensitivity_model_arf_no_cont_nmba_deep_sedation_6_results, file.path(arf_final_data, paste0(institution, "_sensitivity_analysis_lang_cat_6_arf_no_cont_nmba.csv")))

################################################################################

lang_cat_6_arf_no_nmba_cohort <- lang_cat_6_arf_no_nmba_cohort[push_paralytics == 0]

)

# Sensitivity Analysis for Patients who received 0 continuous paralytics or push paralytics in first 48 hours
sensitivity_model_lang_cat_6_arf_no_nmba_cohort <- lm(percent_deep_sedation_48 ~ lang_cat_6 + race_category + age_category + ethnicity_category + bmi + sex_category + factor(hospital_icu_id) + elixhauser_score + SVM_SCORE + laps2 + factor(observation_year),
               data = lang_cat_6_arf_no_nmba_cohort)
```

```{r}
################################################################################
lang_cat_7_arf_no_nmba_cohort <- lang_cat_7_arf_cohort[continuous_nmba_48 == 0]
lang_cat_7_arf_no_nmba_cohort <- lang_cat_7_arf_no_nmba_cohort[push_paralytics == 0]

lang_cat_7_arf_no_nmba_cohort$lang_cat_7 <- relevel(as.factor(lang_cat_7_arf_no_nmba_cohort$lang_cat_7), ref = "english")
lang_cat_7_arf_no_nmba_cohort$sex_category <- relevel(as.factor(lang_cat_7_arf_no_nmba_cohort$sex_category), ref = "male")
lang_cat_7_arf_no_nmba_cohort$race_category <- relevel(as.factor(lang_cat_7_arf_no_nmba_cohort$race_category), ref = "white")
lang_cat_7_arf_no_nmba_cohort$ethnicity_category <- relevel(as.factor(lang_cat_7_arf_no_nmba_cohort$ethnicity_category), ref = "non-hispanic")

########################
# Descriptive Table One
lang_cat_7_arf_no_nmba_cohort_descriptive <- make_table1_federated(
  dt = lang_cat_7_arf_no_nmba_cohort,
  cat_vars = cat_vars,
  cont_vars = cont_vars,
  by = "lang_cat_7",   
  site_name = institution
)

fwrite(
  lang_cat_7_arf_no_nmba_cohort_descriptive,
  file.path(arf_tables_dir, paste0(institution, "_table1_lang_cat_7_arf_no_nmba_cohort_descriptive.csv"))
)

#Comparison Table One
lang_cat_7_arf_no_nmba_cohort_comparisons <- make_table1_comparisons(
  dt = lang_cat_7_arf_no_nmba_cohort,
  by = "lang_cat_7",
  reference_level = "english",
  cont_vars = cont_vars,
  cat_vars = cat_vars,
  site_name = institution
)

fwrite(
  lang_cat_7_arf_no_nmba_cohort_comparisons,
  file.path(arf_tables_dir, paste0(institution, "_table1_lang_cat_7_arf_no_nmba_cohort_comparisons.csv"))
)

# Sensitivity Analysis for Patients who received 0 continuous paralytics or push paralytics in first 48 hours
sensitivity_model_lang_cat_7_arf_no_nmba_cohort <- lm(percent_deep_sedation_48 ~ lang_cat_7 + race_category + age_category + ethnicity_category + bmi + sex_category + factor(hospital_icu_id) + elixhauser_score + SVM_SCORE + laps2 + factor(observation_year),
               data = lang_cat_7_arf_no_nmba_cohort)

summary(sensitivity_model_lang_cat_7_arf_no_nmba_cohort)

# Extract coefficients, standard errors, variance, and p-values for the adjusted model
sensitivity_model_lang_cat_7_arf_no_nmba_cohort_results <- data.frame(
  term = names(coef(sensitivity_model_lang_cat_7_arf_no_nmba_cohort)),
  estimate = coef(sensitivity_model_lang_cat_7_arf_no_nmba_cohort),
  std.error = summary(sensitivity_model_lang_cat_7_arf_no_nmba_cohort)$coefficients[, "Std. Error"],
  variance = (summary(sensitivity_model_lang_cat_7_arf_no_nmba_cohort)$coefficients[, "Std. Error"])^2,
  p.value = summary(sensitivity_model_lang_cat_7_arf_no_nmba_cohort)$coefficients[, "Pr(>|t|)"]
)

# Save the results to a file
fwrite(sensitivity_model_lang_cat_7_arf_no_nmba_cohort_results, file.path(arf_final_data, paste0(institution, "_sensitivity_analysis_lang_cat_7_arf_no_nmba.csv")))

################################################################################
# Pre-Pandemic Analysis
################################################################################

# Save Table 1s
fwrite(
  lang_cat_7_arf_pre_pandemic_cohort_descriptive,
  file.path(arf_tables_dir, paste0(institution, "_table1_lang_cat_7_arf_pre_pandemic_cohort_descriptive.csv"))
)

fwrite(
  lang_cat_7_arf_pre_pandemic_cohort_comparisons,
  file.path(arf_tables_dir, paste0(institution, "_table1_lang_cat_7_arf_pre_pandemic_cohort_comparisons.csv"))
)

# Lang_cat_7 model
tryCatch({
lang_cat_7_arf_pre_pandemic_deep_sedation <- lm(percent_deep_sedation_48 ~ lang_cat_7 + race_category + age_category + ethnicity_category + bmi + sex_category + factor(hospital_icu_id) + elixhauser_score + SVM_SCORE + laps2 + factor(observation_year),
               data = lang_cat_7_arf_pre_pandemic_cohort)

summary(lang_cat_7_arf_pre_pandemic_deep_sedation)

# Extract coefficients, standard errors, variance, and p-values for the adjusted model
lang_cat_7_arf_pre_pandemic_deep_sedation_results <- data.frame(
  term = names(coef(lang_cat_7_arf_pre_pandemic_deep_sedation)),
  estimate = coef(lang_cat_7_arf_pre_pandemic_deep_sedation),
  std.error = summary(lang_cat_7_arf_pre_pandemic_deep_sedation)$coefficients[, "Std. Error"],

)

fwrite(lang_cat_7_arf_pre_pandemic_deep_sedation_results, file.path(arf_final_data, paste0(institution, "_lang_cat_7_arf_pre_pandemic_deep_sedation.csv")))
}, error = function(e) {

})
```

# MEASUREMENTS PROJECT
# Step 1: Define the Cohort
```{r}
################################################################################
# First Define the Cohort
################################################################################
cat_vars <- c("sex_category", "ethnicity_category", "race_category", "hospital_id", "lang_cat_1", "location_of_intubation", "admission_type_category", "arf_flag", "aHrf_flag")

measurements_project_cohort_24 <- total_cohort[imv_duration_hours_final >= 24]
measurements_project_cohort_no_neuro <- measurements_project_cohort_24[!icu_imv %in% c("mixed_neuro_icu", "neuro_icu", "neurosurgical_icu")]
measurements_project_cohort <- measurements_project_cohort_no_neuro[
  continuous_nmba_48 == 0 &
  push_paralytics == 0
]

# Descriptive Table One
measurements_cohort_descriptive <- make_table1_federated(
  dt = measurements_project_cohort,
  cat_vars = cat_vars,
  cont_vars = cont_vars,
  by = "icu_imv",   
  site_name = institution
)

fwrite(
  measurements_cohort_descriptive,
  file.path(measurements_tables_dir, paste0(institution, "_table1_measurements_cohort_descriptive.csv"))
)

#Comparison Table One
measurements_cohort_comparisons <- make_table1_comparisons(
  dt = measurements_project_cohort,
  by = "icu_imv",
  reference_level = "medical_icu",
  cont_vars = cont_vars,
  cat_vars = cat_vars,
  site_name = institution
)

fwrite(
  measurements_cohort_comparisons,
  file.path(measurements_tables_dir, paste0(institution, "_table1_measurements_cohort_comparisons.csv"))
)

# Define Reference Points
measurements_project_cohort$sex_category <- relevel(as.factor(measurements_project_cohort$sex_category), ref = "male")
measurements_project_cohort$race_category <- relevel(as.factor(measurements_project_cohort$race_category), ref = "white")
measurements_project_cohort$ethnicity_category <- relevel(as.factor(measurements_project_cohort$ethnicity_category), ref = "non-hispanic")
measurements_project_cohort$ethnicity_category_final <- relevel(as.factor(measurements_project_cohort$ethnicity_category_final), ref = "non-hispanic/unknown")
measurements_project_cohort$lang_cat_1 <- relevel(as.factor(measurements_project_cohort$lang_cat_1), ref = "english")


```

# Step 2: 28-Day VFDs
```{r}
################################################################################
# Reference Model
################################################################################
reference_model_vfd <- lm(vent_free_days_28_alt ~ lang_cat_1 + race_category + age_category + sex_category + ethnicity_category + bmi + factor(hospital_icu_id) + elixhauser_score + laps2 + location_of_intubation + time_from_begin_imv_to_icu_hours + factor(observation_year),
               data = measurements_project_cohort)

summary(reference_model_vfd)

r_squared_reference_model_vfd <- summary(reference_model_vfd)$r.squared
r_squared_reference_model_vfd  # View the value

# Tidy the model summary into a data frame
reference_model_vfd_df <- broom::tidy(reference_model_vfd)

# Add R-squared as a separate row (optional but helpful for tracking)
reference_model_vfd_final <- rbind(
  reference_model_vfd_df,
  data.frame(term = "R-squared", estimate = r_squared_reference_model_vfd, std.error = NA, statistic = NA, p.value = NA)
)

# Save the results to a file
fwrite(reference_model_vfd_final, file.path(measurements_model_data, paste0(institution, "_reference_model_vfd.csv")))

################################################################################
#1: Proportion of time during first 48 hours (continuous)
################################################################################
model_one <- lm(vent_free_days_28_alt ~ percent_deep_sedation_48 + lang_cat_1 + race_category + age_category + sex_category + ethnicity_category + bmi + factor(hospital_icu_id) + elixhauser_score + laps2 + location_of_intubation + time_from_begin_imv_to_icu_hours + factor(observation_year),
               data = measurements_project_cohort)

summary(model_one)

#r-squared
r_squared_one <- summary(model_one)$r.squared
r_squared_one  # View the value

# F-test comparing reference model to model_one (model_one must be the larger model)
f_test_one <- anova(reference_model_vfd, model_one)
f_test_one

# Tidy the model summary into a data frame
model_one_df <- broom::tidy(model_one)

# Add R-squared as a separate row (optional but helpful for tracking)
model_one_df <- rbind(
  model_one_df,
  data.frame(term = "R-squared", estimate = r_squared_one, std.error = NA, statistic = NA, p.value = NA)
)

# Save the results to a file
fwrite(model_one_df, file.path(measurements_model_data, paste0(institution, "_28dvfd_1.csv")))

################################################################################
#2: Total time during first 48 hours (continuous)
################################################################################
model_two <- lm(vent_free_days_28_alt ~ deep_sedation_count_total_48 + lang_cat_1 + race_category + age_category + sex_category + ethnicity_category + bmi + factor(hospital_icu_id) + elixhauser_score + laps2 + location_of_intubation + time_from_begin_imv_to_icu_hours + factor(observation_year),
               data = measurements_project_cohort)

summary(model_two)

#R-Squared
r_squared_two <- summary(model_two)$r.squared
r_squared_two  # View the value

# F-test comparing reference model to model_two
f_test_two <- anova(reference_model_vfd, model_two)
f_test_two

# Tidy the model summary into a data frame
model_two_df <- broom::tidy(model_two)

# Add R-squared as a separate row (optional but helpful for tracking)
model_two_df <- rbind(
  model_two_df,
  data.frame(term = "R-squared", estimate = r_squared_two, std.error = NA, statistic = NA, p.value = NA)
)

# Save the results to a file
fwrite(model_two_df, file.path(measurements_model_data, paste0(institution, "_28dvfd_2.csv")))

################################################################################
#3: Median RASS (continuous)
################################################################################

model_three <- lm(vent_free_days_28_alt ~ median_rass_cont + lang_cat_1 + race_category + age_category + sex_category + ethnicity_category + bmi + factor(hospital_icu_id) + elixhauser_score + laps2 + location_of_intubation + time_from_begin_imv_to_icu_hours + factor(observation_year),
               data = measurements_project_cohort)

summary(model_three)


#R-squared
r_squared_three <- summary(model_three)$r.squared
r_squared_three  # View the value

# F-test comparing reference model to model_three
f_test_three <- anova(reference_model_vfd, model_three)
f_test_three

# Tidy the model summary into a data frame
model_three_df <- broom::tidy(model_three)

# Add R-squared as a separate row (optional but helpful for tracking)
model_three_df <- rbind(
  model_three_df,
  data.frame(term = "R-squared", estimate = r_squared_three, std.error = NA, statistic = NA, p.value = NA)
)

# Save the results to a file
fwrite(model_three_df, file.path(measurements_model_data, paste0(institution, "_28dvfd_3.csv")))


################################################################################
#4: Median RASS (Binary)
################################################################################
model_four <- lm(vent_free_days_28_alt ~ median_rass_binary + lang_cat_1 + race_category + age_category + sex_category + ethnicity_category + bmi + factor(hospital_icu_id) + elixhauser_score + laps2 + location_of_intubation + time_from_begin_imv_to_icu_hours + factor(observation_year),
               data = measurements_project_cohort)

summary(model_four)

# R-squared
r_squared_four <- summary(model_four)$r.squared
r_squared_four  # View the value

# F-test comparing reference model to model_four
f_test_four <- anova(reference_model_vfd, model_four)
f_test_four

# Tidy the model summary into a data frame
model_four_df <- broom::tidy(model_four)

# Add R-squared as a separate row (optional but helpful for tracking)
model_four_df <- rbind(
  model_four_df,
  data.frame(term = "R-squared", estimate = r_squared_four, std.error = NA, statistic = NA, p.value = NA)
)

# Save the results to a file
fwrite(model_four_df, file.path(measurements_model_data, paste0(institution, "_28dvfd_4.csv")))

################################################################################
#5: RASS Weighted Average
################################################################################
model_five <- lm(vent_free_days_28_alt ~ rass_weighted_avg + lang_cat_1 + race_category + age_category + sex_category + ethnicity_category + bmi + factor(hospital_icu_id) + elixhauser_score + laps2 + location_of_intubation + time_from_begin_imv_to_icu_hours + factor(observation_year),
               data = measurements_project_cohort)

summary(model_five)

#R-squared
r_squared_five <- summary(model_five)$r.squared
r_squared_five  # View the value

# F-test comparing reference model to model_five
f_test_five <- anova(reference_model_vfd, model_five)
f_test_five

# Tidy the model summary into a data frame
model_five_df <- broom::tidy(model_five)

# Add R-squared as a separate row (optional but helpful for tracking)
model_five_df <- rbind(
  model_five_df,
  data.frame(term = "R-squared", estimate = r_squared_five, std.error = NA, statistic = NA, p.value = NA)
)

# Save the results to a file
fwrite(model_five_df, file.path(measurements_model_data, paste0(institution, "_28dvfd_5.csv")))

################################################################################
#6: Deep Sedation Weighted
################################################################################
model_six <- lm(vent_free_days_28_alt ~ deep_sedation_weighted + lang_cat_1 + race_category + age_category + sex_category + ethnicity_category + bmi + factor(hospital_icu_id) + elixhauser_score + laps2 + location_of_intubation + time_from_begin_imv_to_icu_hours + factor(observation_year),
               data = measurements_project_cohort)

summary(model_six)

#R-Squared
r_squared_six <- summary(model_six)$r.squared 
r_squared_six  # View the value

# F-test comparing reference model to model_six
f_test_six <- anova(reference_model_vfd, model_six)
f_test_six

# Tidy the model summary into a data frame
model_six_df <- broom::tidy(model_six)

# Add R-squared as a separate row (optional but helpful for tracking)
model_six_df <- rbind(
  model_six_df,
  data.frame(term = "R-squared", estimate = r_squared_six, std.error = NA, statistic = NA, p.value = NA)
)

# Save the results to a file
fwrite(model_six_df, file.path(measurements_model_data, paste0(institution, "_28dvfd_6.csv")))

################################################################################
#7: Sedation Index Score
################################################################################
model_seven <- lm(vent_free_days_28_alt ~ sedation_index_score + lang_cat_1 + race_category + age_category + sex_category + ethnicity_category + bmi + factor(hospital_icu_id) + elixhauser_score + laps2 + location_of_intubation + time_from_begin_imv_to_icu_hours + factor(observation_year),
               data = measurements_project_cohort)

summary(model_seven) 

#R-Squared
r_squared_seven <- summary(model_seven)$r.squared
r_squared_seven  # View the value

# F-test comparing reference model to model_seven
f_test_seven <- anova(reference_model_vfd, model_seven)
f_test_seven

# Tidy the model summary into a data frame
model_seven_df <- broom::tidy(model_seven)

# Add R-squared as a separate row (optional but helpful for tracking)
model_seven_df <- rbind(
  model_seven_df,
  data.frame(term = "R-squared", estimate = r_squared_seven, std.error = NA, statistic = NA, p.value = NA)
)

# Save the results to a file
fwrite(model_seven_df, file.path(measurements_model_data, paste0(institution, "_28dvfd_7.csv")))

################################################################################
# Create Final VFD Table
################################################################################
vfd_rsquared_f_test_table <- data.table(
  model = c("Proportion of Time Deep Sedation (48hr)", "Total Hours Deep Sedation (48hr)",
            "Median RASS (Continuous)", "Median RASS (Binary)",
            "Time-Weighted RASS (Continuous)", "Time-Weighted RASS (Binary, <= -3)",
            "Sedation Index Score", "Reference Model"),
  r_squared = c(r_squared_one, r_squared_two, r_squared_three, r_squared_four,
                r_squared_five, r_squared_six, r_squared_seven,
                r_squared_reference_model_vfd),
  f_statistic = c(f_test_one$F[2], f_test_two$F[2], f_test_three$F[2],
                  f_test_four$F[2], f_test_five$F[2], f_test_six$F[2],
                  f_test_seven$F[2], NA),  # Reference has no F-test
  f_p_value   = c(f_test_one$`Pr(>F)`[2], f_test_two$`Pr(>F)`[2], f_test_three$`Pr(>F)`[2],
                  f_test_four$`Pr(>F)`[2], f_test_five$`Pr(>F)`[2], f_test_six$`Pr(>F)`[2],
                  f_test_seven$`Pr(>F)`[2], NA)
)


# Save the results to a file
fwrite(vfd_rsquared_f_test_table, file.path(measurements_final_data, paste0(institution, "_vfd_models_rsquared_table.csv")))

```

```{r}
  reference_model_hfd_df,

)

# Save the results to a file

################################################################################
#1: Proportion of time during first 48 hours (continuous)
################################################################################
model_one <- lm(hospital_free_days_28 ~ percent_deep_sedation_48 + lang_cat_1 + race_category + age_category + sex_category + ethnicity_category + bmi + factor(hospital_icu_id) + elixhauser_score + laps2 + location_of_intubation + time_from_begin_imv_to_icu_hours + factor(observation_year),
               data = measurements_project_cohort)

summary(model_one)

#r-squared
r_squared_one <- summary(model_one)$r.squared
r_squared_one  # View the value

# F-test comparing reference model to model_one (model_one must be the larger model)
f_test_one <- anova(reference_model_hfd, model_one)
f_test_one

# Tidy the model summary into a data frame
model_one_df <- broom::tidy(model_one)

# Add R-squared as a separate row (optional but helpful for tracking)
model_one_df <- rbind(
  model_one_df,

)

)

# Create Final HFD Table
################################################################################
hfd_rsquared_f_test_table <- data.table(
  model = c("Proportion of Time Deep Sedation (48hr)", "Total Hours Deep Sedation (48hr)",
            "Median RASS (Continuous)", "Median RASS (Binary)",
            "Time-Weighted RASS (Continuous)", "Time-Weighted RASS (Binary, <= -3)",
            "Sedation Index Score", "Reference Model"),
  r_squared = c(r_squared_one, r_squared_two, r_squared_three, r_squared_four,
                r_squared_five, r_squared_six, r_squared_seven,
                r_squared_reference_model_hfd),
  f_statistic = c(f_test_one$F[2], f_test_two$F[2], f_test_three$F[2],
                  f_test_four$F[2], f_test_five$F[2], f_test_six$F[2],
                  f_test_seven$F[2], NA),  # Reference has no F-test
  f_p_value   = c(f_test_one$`Pr(>F)`[2], f_test_two$`Pr(>F)`[2], f_test_three$`Pr(>F)`[2],
                  f_test_four$`Pr(>F)`[2], f_test_five$`Pr(>F)`[2], f_test_six$`Pr(>F)`[2],
                  f_test_seven$`Pr(>F)`[2], NA)
)

# Save the results to a file
fwrite(hfd_rsquared_f_test_table, file.path(measurements_final_data, paste0(institution, "_hfd_models_rsquared_table.csv")))

```


# Step 5: Tracheostomy Incidence
```{r}
################################################################################
# Reference Model
################################################################################
reference_model_trach <- glm(trached ~ lang_cat_1 + race_category + age_category + sex_category + ethnicity_category + bmi + factor(hospital_icu_id) + elixhauser_score + laps2 + location_of_intubation + time_from_begin_imv_to_icu_hours + factor(observation_year),
               data = measurements_project_cohort,
               family = binomial(link = "logit"))

summary(reference_model_trach)

p2_reference <- pscl::pR2(reference_model_trach)
pseudo_r_squared_reference_model_trach <- unname(p2_reference["McFadden"])
pseudo_r_squared_reference_model_trach  # View the value

# Tidy the model summary into a data frame
reference_model_trach_df <- broom::tidy(reference_model_trach)

# Add pseudo-R-squared as a separate row
reference_model_trach_final <- rbind(
  reference_model_trach_df,
  data.frame(term = "Pseudo-R-squared (McFadden)", estimate = pseudo_r_squared_reference_model_trach, std.error = NA, statistic = NA, p.value = NA)
)

# Save the results to a file
fwrite(reference_model_trach_final, file.path(measurements_model_data, paste0(institution, "_reference_model_trach.csv")))

################################################################################
#1: Proportion of time during first 48 hours (continuous)
################################################################################
model_one <- glm(trached ~ percent_deep_sedation_48 + lang_cat_1 + race_category + age_category + sex_category + ethnicity_category + bmi + factor(hospital_icu_id) + elixhauser_score + laps2 + location_of_intubation + time_from_begin_imv_to_icu_hours + factor(observation_year),
               data = measurements_project_cohort,
               family = binomial(link = "logit"))

summary(model_one)

# Pseudo-R-squared
p2_one <- pscl::pR2(model_one)
pseudo_r_squared_one <- unname(p2_one["McFadden"])
pseudo_r_squared_one  # View the value

# Likelihood Ratio Test vs reference model
lrt_one <- anova(reference_model_trach, model_one, test = "LRT")
lrt_one

# Tidy the model summary into a data frame
model_one_df <- broom::tidy(model_one)

# Add pseudo-R-squared as a separate row
model_one_df <- rbind(
  model_one_df,
  data.frame(term = "Pseudo-R-squared (McFadden)", estimate = pseudo_r_squared_one, std.error = NA, statistic = NA, p.value = NA)
)

# Save the results to a file

               data = measurements_project_cohort,

pseudo_r_squared_two  # View the value

# Likelihood Ratio Test vs reference model

lrt_two

# Tidy the model summary into a data frame

# Add pseudo-R-squared as a separate row

                                pseudo_r_squared_seven, pseudo_r_squared_reference_model_trach),
  lrt_chi_sq  = c(lrt_one$Deviance[2], lrt_two$Deviance[2], lrt_three$Deviance[2],
                  lrt_four$Deviance[2], lrt_five$Deviance[2], lrt_six$Deviance[2],
                  lrt_seven$Deviance[2], NA),  # Reference has no LRT

)
```

```{r}
# Pseudo-R-squared

pseudo_r_squared_three <- unname(p2_three["McFadden"])
pseudo_r_squared_three  # View the value

# Likelihood Ratio Test vs reference model
lrt_three <- anova(reference_model_mortality, model_three, test = "LRT")
lrt_three

# Tidy the model summary into a data frame
model_three_df <- broom::tidy(model_three)

# Add pseudo-R-squared as a separate row
model_three_df <- rbind(
  model_three_df,
  data.frame(term = "Pseudo-R-squared (McFadden)", estimate = pseudo_r_squared_three, std.error = NA, statistic = NA, p.value = NA)
)

# Save the results to a file
fwrite(model_three_df, file.path(measurements_model_data, paste0(institution, "_mortality_3.csv")))

#4: Median RASS (Binary)
################################################################################
model_four <- glm(death_during_admission ~ median_rass_binary + lang_cat_1 + race_category + age_category + sex_category + ethnicity_category + bmi + factor(hospital_icu_id) + elixhauser_score + laps2 + location_of_intubation + time_from_begin_imv_to_icu_hours + factor(observation_year),
               data = measurements_project_cohort,
               family = binomial(link = "logit"))

               data = measurements_project_cohort,

# Create Final Mortality Table
################################################################################
mortality_pseudo_r_squared_lrt_table <- data.table(
  model = c("Proportion of Time Deep Sedation (48hr)", "Total Hours Deep Sedation (48hr)",
            "Median RASS (Continuous)", "Median RASS (Binary)",
            "Time-Weighted RASS (Continuous)", "Time-Weighted RASS (Binary, <= -3)",
            "Sedation Index Score", "Reference Model"),
  pseudo_r_squared_mcfadden = c(pseudo_r_squared_one, pseudo_r_squared_two, pseudo_r_squared_three,
                                pseudo_r_squared_four, pseudo_r_squared_five, pseudo_r_squared_six,
                                pseudo_r_squared_seven, pseudo_r_squared_reference_model_mortality),
  lrt_chi_sq  = c(lrt_one$Deviance[2], lrt_two$Deviance[2], lrt_three$Deviance[2],
                  lrt_four$Deviance[2], lrt_five$Deviance[2], lrt_six$Deviance[2],
                  lrt_seven$Deviance[2], NA),
  lrt_p_value = c(lrt_one$`Pr(>Chi)`[2], lrt_two$`Pr(>Chi)`[2], lrt_three$`Pr(>Chi)`[2],
                  lrt_four$`Pr(>Chi)`[2], lrt_five$`Pr(>Chi)`[2], lrt_six$`Pr(>Chi)`[2],
                  lrt_seven$`Pr(>Chi)`[2], NA)
)

# Save the results to a file
fwrite(mortality_pseudo_r_squared_lrt_table, file.path(measurements_final_data, paste0(institution, "_mortality_models_pseudo_r_squared_table.csv")))
```

# Step 8: Data Cleaning Summary
```{r}
# Step 0: initial count
n_start <- nrow(total_cohort)

# Step 1: Remove Patients intubated for less than 24 hours
n_after_step1 <- nrow(measurements_project_cohort_24)
n_removed_step1 <- n_start - n_after_step1

# Step 2: remove neuro, neurosurg, neuro mixed patients
n_after_step2 <- nrow(measurements_project_cohort_no_neuro)
n_removed_step2 <- n_after_step1 - n_after_step2

# Step 3: remove patients who received continuous or push paralytics
n_after_step3 <- nrow(measurements_project_cohort)
n_removed_step3 <- n_after_step2 - n_after_step3

# Tabulation of exclusions
filter_tab_measurements_project <- data.table(
  step = c(
    "Total IMV Patients",
    "Removed for IMV duration < 24 hours",
    "Removed for admission to neuro ICU",
    "Removed for receiving continuous or push paralytics",
    "Final"
  ),
  n_remaining = c(
    n_start,
    n_after_step1,
    n_after_step2,
    n_after_step3,
    n_after_step3
  ),
  n_removed_this_step = c(
    0,
    n_removed_step1,
    n_removed_step2,
    n_removed_step3,
    0
  )
)

filter_tab_measurements_project

fwrite(filter_tab_measurements_project, 
       file.path(measurements_tables_dir, paste0(institution, "_01_analysis_cleaning_summary.csv")))

```
